Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(** * Univalent Foundations. Vladimir Voevodsky. Feb. 2010 - Sep. 2011.
  Port to coq trunk (8.4-8.5) in March 2014. The second part of the original
  uu0 file, created on Dec. 3, 2014.

This file starts with the definition of h-levels. No axioms are used. Only one
universe [ UU ] is used, except in one case.

In the current approach to dependent eliminators for inductive types, in this case for [ nat ],
the type family appears as an argument of the eliminator in the form of a function. Therefore,
if one wants to use the eliminator [ nat_rect ] to define a function [ nat -> UU ] one must use,
as an argument, the function [ n : nat => UU ] whose type is [ forall n : nat, UU' ] where [ UU' ]
is the type of [ UU ]. Therefore, the eliminator must be defined on arguments whose type contains
[ UU' ] and we should acknowledge it as an instance of using a second universe.

 *)

(** ** Contents
- Basics about h-levels
 - h-levels of types
 - h-levels of functions
 - h-levelf of pr1
 - h-level of the total space of total2
- Basics on propositions, inclusions and sets
 - Propositions, types of h-level 1
 - Inclusions, functions of h-level 1
 - Sets, types of h-level 2
*)


(** ** Preamble *)

(** Imports *)

Require Export UniMath.Foundations.PartA.



(** ** Basics about h-levels *)



(** *** h-levels of types *)


Fixpoint isofhlevel (n : nat) (X : UU) : UU
  := match n with
     | O => iscontr X
     | S m => ∏ x : X, ∏ x' : X, (isofhlevel m (x = x'))
     end.

(* induction induction *)


n: nat
X, Y: UU
p: X → Y
s: Y → X
eps: ∏ y : Y, p (s y) = y
isofhlevel n X → isofhlevel n Y


n: nat
X, Y: UU
p: X → Y
s: Y → X
eps: ∏ y : Y, p (s y) = y
isofhlevel n X → isofhlevel n Y

  
n: nat
∏ (X Y : UU) (p : X → Y) (s : Y → X),
(∏ y : Y, p (s y) = y)
→ isofhlevel n X → isofhlevel n Y

  
∏ (X Y : UU) (p : X → Y) (s : Y → X),
(∏ y : Y, p (s y) = y)
→ isofhlevel 0 X → isofhlevel 0 Y
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (X Y : UU) (p : X → Y) (s : Y → X),
(∏ y : Y, p (s y) = y) → isofhlevel n X → isofhlevel n Y
∏ (X Y : UU) (p : X → Y) (s : Y → X),
(∏ y : Y, p (s y) = y)
→ isofhlevel (S n) X → isofhlevel (S n) Y

  
∏ (X Y : UU) (p : X → Y) (s : Y → X),
(∏ y : Y, p (s y) = y)
→ isofhlevel 0 X → isofhlevel 0 Y
 
X, Y: UU
p: X → Y
s: Y → X
eps: ∏ y : Y, p (s y) = y
X0: isofhlevel 0 X
isofhlevel 0 Y
 
X, Y: UU
p: X → Y
s: Y → X
eps: ∏ y : Y, p (s y) = y
X0: isofhlevel 0 X
iscontr Y

    apply (iscontrretract p s eps X0).
  
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (X Y : UU) (p : X → Y) (s : Y → X),
(∏ y : Y, p (s y) = y) → isofhlevel n X → isofhlevel n Y
∏ (X Y : UU) (p : X → Y) (s : Y → X),
(∏ y : Y, p (s y) = y)
→ isofhlevel (S n) X → isofhlevel (S n) Y
 
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (X Y : UU) (p : X → Y) (s : Y → X),
(∏ y : Y, p (s y) = y) → isofhlevel n X → isofhlevel n Y
∏ (X Y : UU) (p : X → Y) (s : Y → X),
(∏ y : Y, p (s y) = y)
→ (∏ x x' : X,
   (fix isofhlevel (n : nat) (X0 : UU) {struct n} :
        UU :=
      match n with
      | 0 => iscontr X0
      | S m => ∏ x0 x'0 : X0, isofhlevel m (x0 = x'0)
      end) n (x = x'))
  → ∏ x x' : Y,
    (fix isofhlevel (n : nat) (X0 : UU) {struct n} :
         UU :=
       match n with
       | 0 => iscontr X0
       | S m => ∏ x0 x'0 : X0, isofhlevel m (x0 = x'0)
       end) n (x = x')
 
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (X Y : UU) (p : X → Y) (s : Y → X),
(∏ y : Y, p (s y) = y) → isofhlevel n X → isofhlevel n Y
X, Y: UU
p: X → Y
s: Y → X
eps: ∏ y : Y, p (s y) = y
X0: ∏ x x' : X,
(fix isofhlevel (n : nat) (X : UU) {struct n} :
     UU :=
   match n with
   | 0 => iscontr X
   | S m => ∏ x0 x'0 : X, isofhlevel m (x0 = x'0)
   end) n (x = x')
x, x': Y
(fix isofhlevel (n : nat) (X : UU) {struct n} : UU :=
   match n with
   | 0 => iscontr X
   | S m => ∏ x x' : X, isofhlevel m (x = x')
   end) n (x = x')

(∏ y : Y, p (s y) = y) → isofhlevel n X → isofhlevel n Y
X, Y: UU
p: X → Y
s: Y → X
eps: ∏ y : Y, p (s y) = y
X0: ∏ x x' : X,
(fix isofhlevel (n : nat) (X : UU) {struct n} :
     UU :=
   match n with
   | 0 => iscontr X
   | S m => ∏ x0 x'0 : X, isofhlevel m (x0 = x'0)

(∏ y : Y, p (s y) = y) → isofhlevel n X → isofhlevel n Y
X, Y: UU
p: X → Y
s: Y → X
eps: ∏ y : Y, p (s y) = y
X0: ∏ x x' : X,
(fix isofhlevel (n : nat) (X : UU) {struct n} :
     UU :=
   match n with
   | 0 => iscontr X
   | S m => ∏ x0 x'0 : X, isofhlevel m (x0 = x'0)
   end) n (x = x')
x, x': Y
is: isofhlevel n (s x = s x')
(fix isofhlevel (n : nat) (X : UU) {struct n} : UU :=
   match n with
   | 0 => iscontr X
   | S m => ∏ x x' : X, isofhlevel m (x = x')
   end) n (x = x')

    
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (X Y : UU) (p : X → Y) (s : Y → X),
(∏ y : Y, p (s y) = y) → isofhlevel n X → isofhlevel n Y
X, Y: UU
p: X → Y
s: Y → X
eps: ∏ y : Y, p (s y) = y
X0: ∏ x x' : X,
(fix isofhlevel (n : nat) (X : UU) {struct n} :
     UU :=
   match n with
   | 0 => iscontr X
   | S m => ∏ x0 x'0 : X, isofhlevel m (x0 = x'0)
   end) n (x = x')
x, x': Y
is: isofhlevel n (s x = s x')
s':= maponpaths s: x = x' → s x = s x'
(fix isofhlevel (n : nat) (X : UU) {struct n} : UU :=
   match n with
   | 0 => iscontr X
   | S m => ∏ x x' : X, isofhlevel m (x = x')
   end) n (x = x')
 
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (X Y : UU) (p : X → Y) (s : Y → X),
(∏ y : Y, p (s y) = y) → isofhlevel n X → isofhlevel n Y
X, Y: UU
p: X → Y
s: Y → X
eps: ∏ y : Y, p (s y) = y
X0: ∏ x x' : X,
(fix isofhlevel (n : nat) (X : UU) {struct n} :
     UU :=
   match n with
   | 0 => iscontr X
   | S m => ∏ x0 x'0 : X, isofhlevel m (x0 = x'0)
   end) n (x = x')
x, x': Y
is: isofhlevel n (s x = s x')
s':= maponpaths s: x = x' → s x = s x'
p':= pathssec2 s p eps x x': s x = s x' → x = x'
(fix isofhlevel (n : nat) (X : UU) {struct n} : UU :=
   match n with
   | 0 => iscontr X
   | S m => ∏ x x' : X, isofhlevel m (x = x')
   end) n (x = x')

    
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (X Y : UU) (p : X → Y) (s : Y → X),
(∏ y : Y, p (s y) = y) → isofhlevel n X → isofhlevel n Y
X, Y: UU
p: X → Y
s: Y → X
eps: ∏ y : Y, p (s y) = y
X0: ∏ x x' : X,
(fix isofhlevel (n : nat) (X : UU) {struct n} :
     UU :=
   match n with
   | 0 => iscontr X
   | S m => ∏ x0 x'0 : X, isofhlevel m (x0 = x'0)
   end) n (x = x')
x, x': Y
is: isofhlevel n (s x = s x')
s':= maponpaths s: x = x' → s x = s x'
p':= pathssec2 s p eps x x': s x = s x' → x = x'
eps':= pathssec3 s p eps: ∏ e : x = x',
pathssec2 s p eps x x' (maponpaths s e) = e
(fix isofhlevel (n : nat) (X : UU) {struct n} : UU :=
   match n with
   | 0 => iscontr X
   | S m => ∏ x x' : X, isofhlevel m (x = x')
   end) n (x = x')
 
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (X Y : UU) (p : X → Y) (s : Y → X),
(∏ y : Y, p (s y) = y) → isofhlevel n X → isofhlevel n Y
X, Y: UU
p: X → Y
s: Y → X
eps: ∏ y : Y, p (s y) = y
X0: ∏ x x' : X,
(fix isofhlevel (n : nat) (X : UU) {struct n} :
     UU :=
   match n with
   | 0 => iscontr X
   | S m => ∏ x0 x'0 : X, isofhlevel m (x0 = x'0)
   end) n (x = x')
x, x': Y
is: isofhlevel n (s x = s x')
s':= maponpaths s: x = x' → s x = s x'
p':= pathssec2 s p eps x x': s x = s x' → x = x'
eps':= pathssec3 s p eps: ∏ e : x = x',
pathssec2 s p eps x x' (maponpaths s e) = e
(fix isofhlevel (n : nat) (X : UU) {struct n} : UU :=
   match n with
   | 0 => iscontr X
   | S m => ∏ x x' : X, isofhlevel m (x = x')
   end) n (x = x')

    apply (IHn  _ _ p' s' eps' is).
Defined.


n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X ≃ Y
isofhlevel n X → isofhlevel n Y

X, Y: UU
f: X ≃ Y
isofhlevel n X → isofhlevel n Y

X, Y: UU
f: X ≃ Y
X0: isofhlevel n X
isofhlevel n Y

  
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X ≃ Y
X0: isofhlevel n X
isofhlevel n X

  assumption.
Defined.

X, Y: UU
f: X ≃ Y
isofhlevel n Y → isofhlevel n X

f: X ≃ Y

f: X ≃ Y

isofhlevel n X

f: X ≃ Y
X0: isofhlevel n Y

Defined.


n: nat
X: UU
f: X → isofhlevel (S n) X
isofhlevel (S n) X

f: X → isofhlevel (S n) X
isofhlevel (S n) X

X: UU
f: X → isofhlevel (S n) X
isofhlevel (S n) X
 
n: nat
X: UU
f: X → isofhlevel (S n) X
∏ x x' : X, isofhlevel n (x = x')
 
n: nat
X: UU
f: X → isofhlevel (S n) X
x, x': X
isofhlevel n (x = x')
 apply (f x x x').
Defined.


n: nat
X: UU
is: ∏ x : X, isofhlevel (S n) (x = x)
isofhlevel (S (S n)) X


n: nat
X: UU
is: ∏ x : X, isofhlevel (S n) (x = x)
isofhlevel (S (S n)) X

  
n: nat
X: UU
is: ∏ x : X, isofhlevel (S n) (x = x)
isofhlevel (S (S n)) X
 
n: nat
X: UU
is: ∏ x : X, isofhlevel (S n) (x = x)
∏ (x x' : X) (x0 x'0 : x = x'),
isofhlevel n (x0 = x'0)
 
n: nat
X: UU
is: ∏ x : X, isofhlevel (S n) (x = x)
x, x': X
∏ x0 x'0 : x = x', isofhlevel n (x0 = x'0)

  
n: nat
X: UU
is: ∏ x : X, isofhlevel (S n) (x = x)
x, x': X
isofhlevel (S n) (x = x')

  
n: nat
X: UU
is: ∏ x : X, isofhlevel (S n) (x = x)
x, x': X
X1: x = x' → isofhlevel (S n) (x = x')
isofhlevel (S n) (x = x')

  apply (isofhlevelsn n X1).
Defined.







(** *** h-levels of functions *)


Definition isofhlevelf (n : nat) {X Y : UU} (f : X -> Y) : UU
  := ∏ y : Y, isofhlevel n (hfiber f y).



n: nat
X, Y: UU
f, f': X → Y
h: ∏ x : X, f x = f' x
isofhlevelf n f → isofhlevelf n f'


n: nat
X, Y: UU
f, f': X → Y
h: ∏ x : X, f x = f' x
isofhlevelf n f → isofhlevelf n f'

  
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f, f': X → Y
h: ∏ x : X, f x = f' x
X0: isofhlevelf n f
isofhlevelf n f'

  
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f, f': X → Y
h: ∏ x : X, f x = f' x
X0: isofhlevelf n f
∏ y : Y, isofhlevel n (hfiber f' y)
 
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f, f': X → Y
h: ∏ x : X, f x = f' x
X0: isofhlevelf n f
y: Y
isofhlevel n (hfiber f' y)

  apply (isofhlevelweqf n (weqhfibershomot f f' h y) (X0 y)).
Defined.



n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
Q: Y → UU
isofhlevelf n f → isofhlevelf n (fpmap f Q)


n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
Q: Y → UU
isofhlevelf n f → isofhlevelf n (fpmap f Q)

  
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
Q: Y → UU
X0: isofhlevelf n f
isofhlevelf n (fpmap f Q)

  
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
Q: Y → UU
X0: isofhlevelf n f
∏ y : ∑ y : Y, Q y,
isofhlevel n (hfiber (fpmap f Q) y)
 
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
Q: Y → UU
X0: ∏ y : Y, isofhlevel n (hfiber f y)
∏ y : ∑ y : Y, Q y,
isofhlevel n (hfiber (fpmap f Q) y)

  
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
Q: Y → UU
X0: ∏ y : Y, isofhlevel n (hfiber f y)
y: ∑ y : Y, Q y
isofhlevel n (hfiber (fpmap f Q) y)

  
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
Q: Y → UU
X0: ∏ y : Y, isofhlevel n (hfiber f y)
y: ∑ y : Y, Q y
yy:= pr1 y: Y
isofhlevel n (hfiber (fpmap f Q) y)

  
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
Q: Y → UU
X0: ∏ y : Y, isofhlevel n (hfiber f y)
y: ∑ y : Y, Q y
yy:= pr1 y: Y
g:= hfiberfpmap f Q y: hfiber (fpmap f Q) y → hfiber f (pr1 y)
isofhlevel n (hfiber (fpmap f Q) y)

  
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
Q: Y → UU
X0: ∏ y : Y, isofhlevel n (hfiber f y)
y: ∑ y : Y, Q y
yy:= pr1 y: Y
g:= hfiberfpmap f Q y: hfiber (fpmap f Q) y → hfiber f (pr1 y)
is:= isweqhfiberfp f Q y: isweq (hfiberfpmap f Q y)
isofhlevel n (hfiber (fpmap f Q) y)

  
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
Q: Y → UU
X0: ∏ y : Y, isofhlevel n (hfiber f y)
y: ∑ y : Y, Q y
yy:= pr1 y: Y
g:= hfiberfpmap f Q y: hfiber (fpmap f Q) y → hfiber f (pr1 y)
is:= isweqhfiberfp f Q y: isweq (hfiberfpmap f Q y)
isy:= X0 yy: isofhlevel n (hfiber f yy)
isofhlevel n (hfiber (fpmap f Q) y)

  apply (isofhlevelweqb n (make_weq g is) isy).
Defined.




n: nat
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
z: Z
fs: fibseqstr f g z
isz: isofhlevel (S n) Z
isofhlevelf n f


n: nat
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
z: Z
fs: fibseqstr f g z
isz: isofhlevel (S n) Z
isofhlevelf n f

X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
z: Z
fs: fibseqstr f g z
isz: isofhlevel (S n) Z
isofhlevelf n f

X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
z: Z
fs: fibseqstr f g z
isz: isofhlevel (S n) Z
y: Y
isofhlevel n (hfiber f y)

  
n: nat
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
z: Z
fs: fibseqstr f g z
isz: isofhlevel (S n) Z
y: Y
hfiber f y ≃ g y = z
n: nat
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
z: Z
fs: fibseqstr f g z
isz: isofhlevel (S n) Z
y: Y
w: hfiber f y ≃ g y = z
isofhlevel n (hfiber f y)

  
n: nat
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
z: Z
fs: fibseqstr f g z
isz: isofhlevel (S n) Z
y: Y
w: hfiber f y ≃ g y = z
isofhlevel n (hfiber f y)

  apply (isofhlevelweqb n w (isz (g y) z)).
Defined.



n: nat
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
z: Z
fs: fibseqstr f g z
isofhlevelf n g → isofhlevel n X


n: nat
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
z: Z
fs: fibseqstr f g z
isofhlevelf n g → isofhlevel n X

X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
z: Z
fs: fibseqstr f g z
isf: isofhlevelf n g
isofhlevel n X

  
n: nat
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
z: Z
fs: fibseqstr f g z
isf: isofhlevelf n g
X ≃ hfiber g z
n: nat
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
z: Z
fs: fibseqstr f g z
isf: isofhlevelf n g
w: X ≃ hfiber g z
isofhlevel n X

  
n: nat
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
z: Z
fs: fibseqstr f g z
isf: isofhlevelf n g
w: X ≃ hfiber g z
isofhlevel n X

  apply (isofhlevelweqb n w (isf z)).
Defined.



n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
isofhlevel n X → isofhlevel (S n) Y → isofhlevelf n f


n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
isofhlevel n X → isofhlevel (S n) Y → isofhlevelf n f

  
n: nat
∏ (X Y : UU) (f : X → Y),
isofhlevel n X → isofhlevel (S n) Y → isofhlevelf n f

  
∏ (X Y : UU) (f : X → Y),
isofhlevel 0 X → isofhlevel 1 Y → isofhlevelf 0 f
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (X Y : UU) (f : X → Y),
isofhlevel n X → isofhlevel (S n) Y → isofhlevelf n f
∏ (X Y : UU) (f : X → Y),
isofhlevel (S n) X
→ isofhlevel (S (S n)) Y → isofhlevelf (S n) f

  
∏ (X Y : UU) (f : X → Y),
isofhlevel 0 X → isofhlevel 1 Y → isofhlevelf 0 f
 
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: isofhlevel 0 X
X1: isofhlevel 1 Y
isofhlevelf 0 f

    
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: isofhlevel 0 X
X1: isofhlevel 1 Y
isofhlevel 0 Y
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: isofhlevel 0 X
X1: isofhlevel 1 Y
is1: isofhlevel 0 Y
isofhlevelf 0 f

    
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: isofhlevel 0 X
X1: isofhlevel 1 Y
isofhlevel 0 Y

      
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: isofhlevel 0 X
X1: isofhlevel 1 Y
∏ t : Y, t = f (pr1 X0)

      
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: isofhlevel 0 X
X1: isofhlevel 1 Y
t: Y
t = f (pr1 X0)
 
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: isofhlevel 0 X
X1: ∏ x x' : Y, iscontr (x = x')
t: Y
t = f (pr1 X0)

      
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: isofhlevel 0 X
X1: ∏ x x' : Y, iscontr (x = x')
t: Y
is:= X1 t (f (pr1 X0)): iscontr (t = f (pr1 X0))
t = f (pr1 X0)

      apply (pr1 is).
    
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: isofhlevel 0 X
X1: isofhlevel 1 Y
is1: isofhlevel 0 Y
isofhlevelf 0 f

    apply (isweqcontrcontr f X0 is1).

  
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (X Y : UU) (f : X → Y),
isofhlevel n X → isofhlevel (S n) Y → isofhlevelf n f
∏ (X Y : UU) (f : X → Y),
isofhlevel (S n) X
→ isofhlevel (S (S n)) Y → isofhlevelf (S n) f
 
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (X Y : UU) (f : X → Y),
isofhlevel n X → isofhlevel (S n) Y → isofhlevelf n f
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: isofhlevel (S n) X
X1: isofhlevel (S (S n)) Y
isofhlevelf (S n) f
 
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (X Y : UU) (f : X → Y),
isofhlevel n X → isofhlevel (S n) Y → isofhlevelf n f
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: isofhlevel (S n) X
X1: isofhlevel (S (S n)) Y
∏ y : Y, isofhlevel (S n) (hfiber f y)
 
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (X Y : UU) (f : X → Y),
isofhlevel n X → isofhlevel (S n) Y → isofhlevelf n f
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: isofhlevel (S n) X
X1: isofhlevel (S (S n)) Y
∏ (y : Y) (x x' : hfiber f y), isofhlevel n (x = x')

    
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (X Y : UU) (f : X → Y),
isofhlevel n X → isofhlevel (S n) Y → isofhlevelf n f
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: isofhlevel (S n) X
X1: isofhlevel (S (S n)) Y
is1: ∏ x' x : X, isofhlevel n (x' = x)
∏ (y : Y) (x x' : hfiber f y), isofhlevel n (x = x')

    
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (X Y : UU) (f : X → Y),
isofhlevel n X → isofhlevel (S n) Y → isofhlevelf n f
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: isofhlevel (S n) X
X1: isofhlevel (S (S n)) Y
is1: ∏ x' x : X, isofhlevel n (x' = x)
is2: ∏ y' y : Y, isofhlevel (S n) (y' = y)
∏ (y : Y) (x x' : hfiber f y), isofhlevel n (x = x')

    
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (X Y : UU) (f : X → Y),
isofhlevel n X → isofhlevel (S n) Y → isofhlevelf n f
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: isofhlevel (S n) X
X1: isofhlevel (S (S n)) Y
is1: ∏ x' x : X, isofhlevel n (x' = x)
is2: ∏ y' y : Y, isofhlevel (S n) (y' = y)
is3: ∏ (y : Y) (x : X) (xe' : hfiber f y), isofhlevelf n (d2g f x xe')
∏ (y : Y) (x x' : hfiber f y), isofhlevel n (x = x')

    
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (X Y : UU) (f : X → Y),
isofhlevel n X → isofhlevel (S n) Y → isofhlevelf n f
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: isofhlevel (S n) X
X1: isofhlevel (S (S n)) Y
is1: ∏ x' x : X, isofhlevel n (x' = x)
is2: ∏ y' y : Y, isofhlevel (S n) (y' = y)
is3: ∏ (y : Y) (x : X) (xe' : hfiber f y), isofhlevelf n (d2g f x xe')
is4: ∏ (y : Y) (x : X) (xe' : hfiber f y) (e : f x = y),
isofhlevel n (make_hfiber f x e = xe')
∏ (y : Y) (x x' : hfiber f y), isofhlevel n (x = x')

    
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (X Y : UU) (f : X → Y),
isofhlevel n X → isofhlevel (S n) Y → isofhlevelf n f
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: isofhlevel (S n) X
X1: isofhlevel (S (S n)) Y
is1: ∏ x' x : X, isofhlevel n (x' = x)
is2: ∏ y' y : Y, isofhlevel (S n) (y' = y)
is3: ∏ (y : Y) (x : X) (xe' : hfiber f y), isofhlevelf n (d2g f x xe')
is4: ∏ (y : Y) (x : X) (xe' : hfiber f y) (e : f x = y),
isofhlevel n (make_hfiber f x e = xe')
y: Y
xe, xe': hfiber f y
isofhlevel n (xe = xe')
 
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (X Y : UU) (f : X → Y),
isofhlevel n X → isofhlevel (S n) Y → isofhlevelf n f
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: isofhlevel (S n) X
X1: isofhlevel (S (S n)) Y
is1: ∏ x' x : X, isofhlevel n (x' = x)
is2: ∏ y' y : Y, isofhlevel (S n) (y' = y)
is3: ∏ (y : Y) (x : X) (xe' : hfiber f y), isofhlevelf n (d2g f x xe')
is4: ∏ (y : Y) (x : X) (xe' : hfiber f y) (e : f x = y),
isofhlevel n (make_hfiber f x e = xe')
y: Y
t: X
x: f t = y
xe': hfiber f y
isofhlevel n (t,, x = xe')

    apply (is4 y t xe' x).
Defined.




n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
isofhlevelf n f → isofhlevel n Y → isofhlevel n X


n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
isofhlevelf n f → isofhlevel n Y → isofhlevel n X

  
n: nat
∏ (X Y : UU) (f : X → Y),
isofhlevelf n f → isofhlevel n Y → isofhlevel n X

  
∏ (X Y : UU) (f : X → Y),
isofhlevelf 0 f → isofhlevel 0 Y → isofhlevel 0 X
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (X Y : UU) (f : X → Y), isofhlevelf n f → isofhlevel n Y → isofhlevel n X
∏ (X Y : UU) (f : X → Y),
isofhlevelf (S n) f
→ isofhlevel (S n) Y → isofhlevel (S n) X

  
∏ (X Y : UU) (f : X → Y),
isofhlevelf 0 f → isofhlevel 0 Y → isofhlevel 0 X
 
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: isofhlevelf 0 f
X1: isofhlevel 0 Y
isofhlevel 0 X

    apply (iscontrweqb (make_weq f X0) X1).

IHn: ∏ (X Y : UU) (f : X → Y), isofhlevelf n f → isofhlevel n Y → isofhlevel n X
∏ (X Y : UU) (f : X → Y),
isofhlevelf (S n) f
→ isofhlevel (S n) Y → isofhlevel (S n) X

f: X → Y

X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: isofhlevelf (S n) f
X1: isofhlevel (S n) Y
∏ x x' : X, isofhlevel n (x = x')

IHn: ∏ (X Y : UU) (f : X → Y), isofhlevelf n f → isofhlevel n Y → isofhlevel n X

∏ x x' : X, isofhlevel n (x = x')

f: X → Y

∏ (y : Y) (x : X) (xe' : hfiber f y),

n: nat
IHn: ∏ (X Y : UU) (f : X → Y), isofhlevelf n f → isofhlevel n Y → isofhlevel n X
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: isofhlevelf (S n) f
X1: isofhlevel (S n) Y
is1: ∏ (y : Y) (xe xe' : hfiber f y), isofhlevel n (xe = xe')
y: Y
x: X
xe': hfiber f y
y0: f x = y
isofhlevel n (hfiber (d2g f x xe') y0)

      apply (isofhlevelweqf n (ezweq3g f x xe' y0)
                            (is1 y (make_hfiber f x y0) xe')).
    
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (X Y : UU) (f : X → Y), isofhlevelf n f → isofhlevel n Y → isofhlevel n X
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: isofhlevelf (S n) f
X1: isofhlevel (S n) Y
is1: ∏ (y : Y) (xe xe' : hfiber f y), isofhlevel n (xe = xe')
is2: ∏ (y : Y) (x : X) (xe' : hfiber f y), isofhlevelf n (d2g f x xe')
∏ x x' : X, isofhlevel n (x = x')

X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: isofhlevelf (S n) f
X1: isofhlevel (S n) Y
is1: ∏ (y : Y) (xe xe' : hfiber f y), isofhlevel n (xe = xe')
is2: ∏ (y : Y) (x : X) (xe' : hfiber f y), isofhlevelf n (d2g f x xe')
is3: ∏ y' y : Y, isofhlevel n (y' = y)
∏ x x' : X, isofhlevel n (x = x')

    
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (X Y : UU) (f : X → Y), isofhlevelf n f → isofhlevel n Y → isofhlevel n X
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: isofhlevelf (S n) f
X1: isofhlevel (S n) Y
is1: ∏ (y : Y) (xe xe' : hfiber f y), isofhlevel n (xe = xe')
is2: ∏ (y : Y) (x : X) (xe' : hfiber f y), isofhlevelf n (d2g f x xe')
is3: ∏ y' y : Y, isofhlevel n (y' = y)
x', x: X
isofhlevel n (x' = x)

    
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (X Y : UU) (f : X → Y), isofhlevelf n f → isofhlevel n Y → isofhlevel n X
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: isofhlevelf (S n) f
X1: isofhlevel (S n) Y
is1: ∏ (y : Y) (xe xe' : hfiber f y), isofhlevel n (xe = xe')
is2: ∏ (y : Y) (x : X) (xe' : hfiber f y), isofhlevelf n (d2g f x xe')
is3: ∏ y' y : Y, isofhlevel n (y' = y)
x', x: X
y:= f x': Y
isofhlevel n (x' = x)
 
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (X Y : UU) (f : X → Y), isofhlevelf n f → isofhlevel n Y → isofhlevel n X
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: isofhlevelf (S n) f
X1: isofhlevel (S n) Y
is1: ∏ (y : Y) (xe xe' : hfiber f y), isofhlevel n (xe = xe')
is2: ∏ (y : Y) (x : X) (xe' : hfiber f y), isofhlevelf n (d2g f x xe')
is3: ∏ y' y : Y, isofhlevel n (y' = y)
x', x: X
y:= f x': Y
e':= idpath y: y = y
isofhlevel n (x' = x)
 
n: nat
IHn: ∏ (X Y : UU) (f : X → Y), isofhlevelf n f → isofhlevel n Y → isofhlevel n X
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: isofhlevelf (S n) f
X1: isofhlevel (S n) Y
is1: ∏ (y : Y) (xe xe' : hfiber f y), isofhlevel n (xe = xe')
is2: ∏ (y : Y) (x : X) (xe' : hfiber f y), isofhlevelf n (d2g f x xe')
is3: ∏ y' y : Y, isofhlevel n (y' = y)
x', x: X
y:= f x': Y
e':= idpath y: y = y
xe':= make_hfiber f x' e': hfiber f y
isofhlevel n (x' = x)

    apply (IHn  _ _ (d2g  f x xe') (is2 y x xe') (is3 (f x) y)).
Defined.

X: UU
P: X → UU

is: ∏ x' : X, isofhlevel n (x' = x)
isofhlevelf n (tpair P x)

is: ∏ x' : X, isofhlevel n (x' = x)

P: X → UU
x: X
is: ∏ x' : X, isofhlevel n (x' = x)
xp: ∑ y, P y
isofhlevel n (hfiber (tpair P x) xp)

  apply (isofhlevelweqf n (ezweq1pr1 P x xp) (is (pr1 xp))).
Defined.

f: X → Y
y: Y
is: ∏ y' : Y, isofhlevel n (y' = y)

isofhlevel n (hfiber (hfiberpr1 f y) x)

  apply (isofhlevelweqf n (ezweq1g f y x) (is (f x))).
Defined.

 assumption.
Defined.

 assumption.
Defined.

is: isofhlevel (S n) Y
y': Y
isofhlevel n (y' = y)
 apply (is y' y).
Defined.







n: nat
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
isofhlevelf n (λ x : X, g (f x))
→ isofhlevelf (S n) g → isofhlevelf n f


n: nat
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
isofhlevelf n (λ x : X, g (f x))
→ isofhlevelf (S n) g → isofhlevelf n f

  
n: nat
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
X0: isofhlevelf n (λ x : X, g (f x))
X1: isofhlevelf (S n) g
isofhlevelf n f
 
n: nat
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
X0: isofhlevelf n (λ x : X, g (f x))
X1: isofhlevelf (S n) g
∏ y : Y, isofhlevel n (hfiber f y)
 
n: nat
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
X0: isofhlevelf n (λ x : X, g (f x))
X1: isofhlevelf (S n) g
y: Y
isofhlevel n (hfiber f y)

  
n: nat
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
X0: isofhlevelf n (λ x : X, g (f x))
X1: isofhlevelf (S n) g
y: Y
ye:= make_hfiber g y (idpath (g y)): hfiber g (g y)
isofhlevel n (hfiber f y)

  apply (isofhlevelweqb n ( ezweqhf f g (g y) ye)
                        (isofhlevelffromXY n _ (X0 (g y)) (X1 (g y)) ye)).
Defined.




n: nat
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
isofhlevelf n f
→ isofhlevelf n g → isofhlevelf n (λ x : X, g (f x))


n: nat
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
isofhlevelf n f
→ isofhlevelf n g → isofhlevelf n (λ x : X, g (f x))

  
n: nat
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
X0: isofhlevelf n f
X1: isofhlevelf n g
isofhlevelf n (λ x : X, g (f x))
 
n: nat
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
X0: isofhlevelf n f
X1: isofhlevelf n g
∏ y : Z, isofhlevel n (hfiber (λ x : X, g (f x)) y)
 
n: nat
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
X0: isofhlevelf n f
X1: isofhlevelf n g
z: Z
isofhlevel n (hfiber (λ x : X, g (f x)) z)

  
n: nat
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
X0: isofhlevelf n f
X1: isofhlevelf n g
z: Z
isofhlevelf n (hfibersgftog f g z)
n: nat
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
X0: isofhlevelf n f
X1: isofhlevelf n g
z: Z
is1: isofhlevelf n (hfibersgftog f g z)
isofhlevel n (hfiber (λ x : X, g (f x)) z)

  
n: nat
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
X0: isofhlevelf n f
X1: isofhlevelf n g
z: Z
isofhlevelf n (hfibersgftog f g z)

    
n: nat
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
X0: isofhlevelf n f
X1: isofhlevelf n g
z: Z
∏ y : hfiber g z,
isofhlevel n (hfiber (hfibersgftog f g z) y)
 
n: nat
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
X0: isofhlevelf n f
X1: isofhlevelf n g
z: Z
ye: hfiber g z
isofhlevel n (hfiber (hfibersgftog f g z) ye)

    apply (isofhlevelweqf n (ezweqhf f g z ye) (X0 (pr1 ye))).
  
n: nat
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
X0: isofhlevelf n f
X1: isofhlevelf n g
z: Z
is1: isofhlevelf n (hfibersgftog f g z)
isofhlevel n (hfiber (λ x : X, g (f x)) z)

  
n: nat
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
X0: isofhlevelf n f
X1: isofhlevelf n g
z: Z
is1: isofhlevelf n (hfibersgftog f g z)
is2: isofhlevel n (hfiber g z)
isofhlevel n (hfiber (λ x : X, g (f x)) z)

  apply (isofhlevelXfromfY n  _ is1 is2).
Defined.




n: nat
X, Y, Z: UU
w: X ≃ Y
g: Y → Z
is: isofhlevelf n (λ x : X, g (w x))
isofhlevelf n g

w: X ≃ Y
g: Y → Z

g: Y → Z

is': isweq (hfibersgftog w g z)

n: nat
X, Y, Z: UU
w: X ≃ Y
g: Y → Z
is: isofhlevelf n (λ x : X, g (w x))
z: Z

n: nat
X, Y, Z: UU
w: X ≃ Y
g: Y → Z
is: isofhlevelf n (λ x : X, g (w x))
z: Z
ye: hfiber g z
iscontr (hfiber (hfibersgftog w g z) ye)

    apply (iscontrweqf (ezweqhf w g z ye) (pr2 w (pr1 ye))).
  
n: nat
X, Y, Z: UU
w: X ≃ Y
g: Y → Z
is: isofhlevelf n (λ x : X, g (w x))
z: Z
is': isweq (hfibersgftog w g z)
isofhlevel n (hfiber g z)

  apply (isofhlevelweqf _ (make_weq _ is') (is _)).
Defined.

n: nat
X, Y, Z: UU
w: X ≃ Y
g: Y → Z
is: isofhlevelf n g
z: Z
is': isweq (hfibersgftog w g z)
isofhlevel n (hfiber (λ x : X, g (w x)) z)

  apply (isofhlevelweqb _ (make_weq _ is') (is _)).
Defined.




n: nat
X, X', Y: UU
f: X → Y
f': X' → Y
w: X ≃ X'
h: ∏ x : X, f x = f' (w x)
isofhlevelf n f → isofhlevelf n f'


n: nat
X, X', Y: UU
f: X → Y
f': X' → Y
w: X ≃ X'
h: ∏ x : X, f x = f' (w x)
isofhlevelf n f → isofhlevelf n f'

  
n: nat
X, X', Y: UU
f: X → Y
f': X' → Y
w: X ≃ X'
h: ∏ x : X, f x = f' (w x)
X0: isofhlevelf n f
isofhlevelf n f'

  
n: nat
X, X', Y: UU
f: X → Y
f': X' → Y
w: X ≃ X'
h: ∏ x : X, f x = f' (w x)
X0: isofhlevelf n f
X1: isofhlevelf n (λ x : X, f' (w x))
isofhlevelf n f'

  apply (isofhlevelfgwtog n w f' X1).
Defined.





n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
x, x': X
isofhlevelf (S n) f → isofhlevelf n (maponpaths f)

X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
x, x': X
isofhlevelf (S n) f → isofhlevelf n (maponpaths f)

X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
x, x': X
X0: isofhlevelf (S n) f
isofhlevelf n (maponpaths f)

X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
x, x': X
X0: isofhlevelf (S n) f
y:= f x': Y
isofhlevelf n (maponpaths f)
 
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
x, x': X
X0: isofhlevelf (S n) f
y:= f x': Y
xe':= make_hfiber f x' (idpath (f x')): hfiber f (f x')
isofhlevelf n (maponpaths f)

X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
x, x': X
X0: isofhlevelf (S n) f
y:= f x': Y
xe':= make_hfiber f x' (idpath (f x')): hfiber f (f x')
isofhlevelf n (d2g f x xe')

X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
x, x': X
X0: isofhlevelf (S n) f
y:= f x': Y
xe':= make_hfiber f x' (idpath (f x')): hfiber f (f x')
is1: isofhlevelf n (d2g f x xe')
isofhlevelf n (maponpaths f)

  
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
x, x': X
X0: isofhlevelf (S n) f
y:= f x': Y
xe':= make_hfiber f x' (idpath (f x')): hfiber f (f x')
isofhlevelf n (d2g f x xe')

    
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
x, x': X
X0: isofhlevelf (S n) f
y:= f x': Y
xe':= make_hfiber f x' (idpath (f x')): hfiber f (f x')
∏ y : f x = f x',
isofhlevel n (hfiber (d2g f x xe') y)
 
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
x, x': X
X0: isofhlevelf (S n) f
y:= f x': Y
xe':= make_hfiber f x' (idpath (f x')): hfiber f (f x')
y0: f x = f x'
isofhlevel n (hfiber (d2g f x xe') y0)

    apply (isofhlevelweqf n (ezweq3g f x xe' y0)
                          (X0 y (make_hfiber f x y0) xe')).
  
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
x, x': X
X0: isofhlevelf (S n) f
y:= f x': Y
xe':= make_hfiber f x' (idpath (f x')): hfiber f (f x')
is1: isofhlevelf n (d2g f x xe')
isofhlevelf n (maponpaths f)

  
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
x, x': X
X0: isofhlevelf (S n) f
y:= f x': Y
xe':= make_hfiber f x' (idpath (f x')): hfiber f (f x')
is1: isofhlevelf n (d2g f x xe')
∏ ee : x' = x, d2g f x xe' ee = maponpaths f (! ee)
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
x, x': X
X0: isofhlevelf (S n) f
y:= f x': Y
xe':= make_hfiber f x' (idpath (f x')): hfiber f (f x')
is1: isofhlevelf n (d2g f x xe')
h: ∏ ee : x' = x,
d2g f x xe' ee = maponpaths f (! ee)
isofhlevelf n (maponpaths f)

  
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
x, x': X
X0: isofhlevelf (S n) f
y:= f x': Y
xe':= make_hfiber f x' (idpath (f x')): hfiber f (f x')
is1: isofhlevelf n (d2g f x xe')
∏ ee : x' = x, d2g f x xe' ee = maponpaths f (! ee)

    
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
x, x': X
X0: isofhlevelf (S n) f
y:= f x': Y
xe':= make_hfiber f x' (idpath (f x')): hfiber f (f x')
is1: isofhlevelf n (d2g f x xe')
ee: x' = x
d2g f x xe' ee = maponpaths f (! ee)

    
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
x, x': X
X0: isofhlevelf (S n) f
y:= f x': Y
xe':= make_hfiber f x' (idpath (f x')): hfiber f (f x')
is1: isofhlevelf n (d2g f x xe')
ee: x' = x
e0: maponpaths f (! ee) @ idpath (f x') =
maponpaths f (! ee)
d2g f x xe' ee = maponpaths f (! ee)

    apply (e0).
  
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
x, x': X
X0: isofhlevelf (S n) f
y:= f x': Y
xe':= make_hfiber f x' (idpath (f x')): hfiber f (f x')
is1: isofhlevelf n (d2g f x xe')
h: ∏ ee : x' = x,
d2g f x xe' ee = maponpaths f (! ee)
isofhlevelf n (maponpaths f)

  apply (isofhlevelfhomot2 n _ _ (make_weq (@pathsinv0 _ x' x)
                                          (isweqpathsinv0 _ _)) h is1).
Defined.




n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
(∏ x x' : X, isofhlevelf n (maponpaths f))
→ isofhlevelf (S n) f

X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
(∏ x x' : X, isofhlevelf n (maponpaths f))
→ isofhlevelf (S n) f

X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: ∏ x x' : X, isofhlevelf n (maponpaths f)
isofhlevelf (S n) f
 
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: ∏ x x' : X, isofhlevelf n (maponpaths f)
∏ y : Y, isofhlevel (S n) (hfiber f y)
 
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: ∏ x x' : X, isofhlevelf n (maponpaths f)
y: Y
isofhlevel (S n) (hfiber f y)
 
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: ∏ x x' : X, isofhlevelf n (maponpaths f)
y: Y
∏ x x' : hfiber f y, isofhlevel n (x = x')

  
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: ∏ x x' : X, isofhlevelf n (maponpaths f)
y: Y
x, x': hfiber f y
isofhlevel n (x = x')

  
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: ∏ x x' : X, isofhlevelf n (maponpaths f)
y: Y
x: X
e: f x = y
x': hfiber f y
isofhlevel n (x,, e = x')
 
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: ∏ x x' : X, isofhlevelf n (maponpaths f)
y: Y
x: X
e: f x = y
x': X
e': f x' = y
isofhlevel n (x,, e = x',, e')
 
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: ∏ x x' : X, isofhlevelf n (maponpaths f)
x, x': X
e: f x = f x'
isofhlevel n (x,, e = x',, idpath (f x'))

  
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: ∏ x x' : X, isofhlevelf n (maponpaths f)
x, x': X
e: f x = f x'
xe':= make_hfiber f x' (idpath (f x')): hfiber f (f x')
isofhlevel n (x,, e = x',, idpath (f x'))

  
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: ∏ x x' : X, isofhlevelf n (maponpaths f)
x, x': X
e: f x = f x'
xe':= make_hfiber f x' (idpath (f x')): hfiber f (f x')
xe:= make_hfiber f x e: hfiber f (f x')
isofhlevel n (x,, e = x',, idpath (f x'))

  
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: ∏ x x' : X, isofhlevelf n (maponpaths f)
x, x': X
e: f x = f x'
xe':= make_hfiber f x' (idpath (f x')): hfiber f (f x')
xe:= make_hfiber f x e: hfiber f (f x')
d3:= d2g f x xe': pr1 xe' = x → f x = f x'
isofhlevel n (x,, e = x',, idpath (f x'))
 
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: ∏ x x' : X, isofhlevelf n (maponpaths f)
x, x': X
e: f x = f x'
xe':= make_hfiber f x' (idpath (f x')): hfiber f (f x')
xe:= make_hfiber f x e: hfiber f (f x')
d3:= d2g f x xe': x' = x → f x = f x'
isofhlevel n (x,, e = x',, idpath (f x'))

  
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: ∏ x x' : X, isofhlevelf n (maponpaths f)
x, x': X
e: f x = f x'
xe':= make_hfiber f x' (idpath (f x')): hfiber f (f x')
xe:= make_hfiber f x e: hfiber f (f x')
d3:= d2g f x xe': x' = x → f x = f x'
isofhlevelf n (d2g f x xe')
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: ∏ x x' : X, isofhlevelf n (maponpaths f)
x, x': X
e: f x = f x'
xe':= make_hfiber f x' (idpath (f x')): hfiber f (f x')
xe:= make_hfiber f x e: hfiber f (f x')
d3:= d2g f x xe': x' = x → f x = f x'
is1: isofhlevelf n (d2g f x xe')
isofhlevel n (x,, e = x',, idpath (f x'))

  
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: ∏ x x' : X, isofhlevelf n (maponpaths f)
x, x': X
e: f x = f x'
xe':= make_hfiber f x' (idpath (f x')): hfiber f (f x')
xe:= make_hfiber f x e: hfiber f (f x')
d3:= d2g f x xe': x' = x → f x = f x'
∏ ee : x' = x, maponpaths f (! ee) = d2g f x xe' ee
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: ∏ x x' : X, isofhlevelf n (maponpaths f)
x, x': X
e: f x = f x'
xe':= make_hfiber f x' (idpath (f x')): hfiber f (f x')
xe:= make_hfiber f x e: hfiber f (f x')
d3:= d2g f x xe': x' = x → f x = f x'
h: ∏ ee : x' = x,
maponpaths f (! ee) = d2g f x xe' ee
isofhlevelf n (d2g f x xe')
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: ∏ x x' : X, isofhlevelf n (maponpaths f)
x, x': X
e: f x = f x'
xe':= make_hfiber f x' (idpath (f x')): hfiber f (f x')
xe:= make_hfiber f x e: hfiber f (f x')
d3:= d2g f x xe': x' = x → f x = f x'
is1: isofhlevelf n (d2g f x xe')
isofhlevel n (x,, e = x',, idpath (f x'))

  
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: ∏ x x' : X, isofhlevelf n (maponpaths f)
x, x': X
e: f x = f x'
xe':= make_hfiber f x' (idpath (f x')): hfiber f (f x')
xe:= make_hfiber f x e: hfiber f (f x')
d3:= d2g f x xe': x' = x → f x = f x'
∏ ee : x' = x, maponpaths f (! ee) = d2g f x xe' ee

    
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: ∏ x x' : X, isofhlevelf n (maponpaths f)
x, x': X
e: f x = f x'
xe':= make_hfiber f x' (idpath (f x')): hfiber f (f x')
xe:= make_hfiber f x e: hfiber f (f x')
d3:= d2g f x xe': x' = x → f x = f x'
ee: x' = x
maponpaths f (! ee) = d2g f x xe' ee
 
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: ∏ x x' : X, isofhlevelf n (maponpaths f)
x, x': X
e: f x = f x'
xe':= make_hfiber f x' (idpath (f x')): hfiber f (f x')
xe:= make_hfiber f x e: hfiber f (f x')
d3:= d2g f x xe': x' = x → f x = f x'
ee: x' = x
maponpaths f (! ee) = maponpaths f (! ee) @ pr2 xe'
 
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: ∏ x x' : X, isofhlevelf n (maponpaths f)
x, x': X
e: f x = f x'
xe':= make_hfiber f x' (idpath (f x')): hfiber f (f x')
xe:= make_hfiber f x e: hfiber f (f x')
d3:= d2g f x xe': x' = x → f x = f x'
ee: x' = x
maponpaths f (! ee) =
maponpaths f (! ee) @ idpath (f x')

    apply (pathsinv0 (pathscomp0rid _)).
  
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: ∏ x x' : X, isofhlevelf n (maponpaths f)
x, x': X
e: f x = f x'
xe':= make_hfiber f x' (idpath (f x')): hfiber f (f x')
xe:= make_hfiber f x e: hfiber f (f x')
d3:= d2g f x xe': x' = x → f x = f x'
h: ∏ ee : x' = x,
maponpaths f (! ee) = d2g f x xe' ee
isofhlevelf n (d2g f x xe')
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: ∏ x x' : X, isofhlevelf n (maponpaths f)
x, x': X
e: f x = f x'
xe':= make_hfiber f x' (idpath (f x')): hfiber f (f x')
xe:= make_hfiber f x e: hfiber f (f x')
d3:= d2g f x xe': x' = x → f x = f x'
is1: isofhlevelf n (d2g f x xe')
isofhlevel n (x,, e = x',, idpath (f x'))

  
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: ∏ x x' : X, isofhlevelf n (maponpaths f)
x, x': X
e: f x = f x'
xe':= make_hfiber f x' (idpath (f x')): hfiber f (f x')
xe:= make_hfiber f x e: hfiber f (f x')
d3:= d2g f x xe': x' = x → f x = f x'
h: ∏ ee : x' = x,
maponpaths f (! ee) = d2g f x xe' ee
is2: isofhlevelf n (λ ee : x' = x, maponpaths f (! ee))
isofhlevelf n (d2g f x xe')
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: ∏ x x' : X, isofhlevelf n (maponpaths f)
x, x': X
e: f x = f x'
xe':= make_hfiber f x' (idpath (f x')): hfiber f (f x')
xe:= make_hfiber f x e: hfiber f (f x')
d3:= d2g f x xe': x' = x → f x = f x'
is1: isofhlevelf n (d2g f x xe')
isofhlevel n (x,, e = x',, idpath (f x'))

  
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: ∏ x x' : X, isofhlevelf n (maponpaths f)
x, x': X
e: f x = f x'
xe':= make_hfiber f x' (idpath (f x')): hfiber f (f x')
xe:= make_hfiber f x e: hfiber f (f x')
d3:= d2g f x xe': x' = x → f x = f x'
is1: isofhlevelf n (d2g f x xe')
isofhlevel n (x,, e = x',, idpath (f x'))

  apply (isofhlevelweqb n (ezweq3g f x xe' e) (is1 e)).
Defined.



n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
(∏ x : X, isofhlevelf (S n) (maponpaths f))
→ isofhlevelf (S (S n)) f


n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
(∏ x : X, isofhlevelf (S n) (maponpaths f))
→ isofhlevelf (S (S n)) f

X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: ∏ x : X, isofhlevelf (S n) (maponpaths f)
isofhlevelf (S (S n)) f

X0: ∏ x : X, isofhlevelf (S n) (maponpaths f)
∏ y : Y, isofhlevel (S (S n)) (hfiber f y)

f: X → Y
X0: ∏ x : X, isofhlevelf (S n) (maponpaths f)
y: Y

y: Y
∏ xe0 : hfiber f y, isofhlevel (S n) (xe0 = xe0)

y: Y
X1: ∏ xe0 : hfiber f y, isofhlevel (S n) (xe0 = xe0)
isofhlevel (S (S n)) (hfiber f y)

e: f x = y

x: X

x: X
e':= idpath (f x): f x = f x

x: X
e':= idpath (f x): f x = f x
xe':= make_hfiber f x e': hfiber f (f x)
isofhlevel (S n) (x,, e' = x,, e')

x: X

xe', xe:= make_hfiber f x e': hfiber f (f x)

x: X
e':= idpath (f x): f x = f x
xe', xe:= make_hfiber f x e': hfiber f (f x)
d3:= d2g f x xe': pr1 xe' = x → f x = f x
isofhlevel (S n) (x,, e' = x,, e')

X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: ∏ x : X, isofhlevelf (S n) (maponpaths f)
x: X
e':= idpath (f x): f x = f x
xe', xe:= make_hfiber f x e': hfiber f (f x)
d3:= d2g f x xe': x = x → f x = f x
isofhlevel (S n) (x,, e' = x,, e')

xe', xe:= make_hfiber f x e': hfiber f (f x)
d3:= d2g f x xe': x = x → f x = f x
isofhlevelf (S n) (d2g f x xe')
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: ∏ x : X, isofhlevelf (S n) (maponpaths f)
x: X
e':= idpath (f x): f x = f x
xe', xe:= make_hfiber f x e': hfiber f (f x)
d3:= d2g f x xe': x = x → f x = f x
is1: isofhlevelf (S n) (d2g f x xe')
isofhlevel (S n) (x,, e' = x,, e')

    
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: ∏ x : X, isofhlevelf (S n) (maponpaths f)
x: X
e':= idpath (f x): f x = f x
xe', xe:= make_hfiber f x e': hfiber f (f x)
d3:= d2g f x xe': x = x → f x = f x
isofhlevelf (S n) (d2g f x xe')

      
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: ∏ x : X, isofhlevelf (S n) (maponpaths f)
x: X
e':= idpath (f x): f x = f x
xe', xe:= make_hfiber f x e': hfiber f (f x)
d3:= d2g f x xe': x = x → f x = f x
∏ ee : x = x, maponpaths f (! ee) = d2g f x xe' ee
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: ∏ x : X, isofhlevelf (S n) (maponpaths f)
x: X
e':= idpath (f x): f x = f x
xe', xe:= make_hfiber f x e': hfiber f (f x)
d3:= d2g f x xe': x = x → f x = f x
h: ∏ ee : x = x, maponpaths f (! ee) = d2g f x xe' ee
isofhlevelf (S n) (d2g f x xe')

      
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: ∏ x : X, isofhlevelf (S n) (maponpaths f)
x: X
e':= idpath (f x): f x = f x
xe', xe:= make_hfiber f x e': hfiber f (f x)
d3:= d2g f x xe': x = x → f x = f x
∏ ee : x = x, maponpaths f (! ee) = d2g f x xe' ee

        
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: ∏ x : X, isofhlevelf (S n) (maponpaths f)
x: X
e':= idpath (f x): f x = f x
xe', xe:= make_hfiber f x e': hfiber f (f x)
d3:= d2g f x xe': x = x → f x = f x
ee: x = x
maponpaths f (! ee) = d2g f x xe' ee
 
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: ∏ x : X, isofhlevelf (S n) (maponpaths f)
x: X
e':= idpath (f x): f x = f x
xe', xe:= make_hfiber f x e': hfiber f (f x)
d3:= d2g f x xe': x = x → f x = f x
ee: x = x
maponpaths f (! ee) = maponpaths f (! ee) @ pr2 xe'
 
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: ∏ x : X, isofhlevelf (S n) (maponpaths f)
x: X
e':= idpath (f x): f x = f x
xe', xe:= make_hfiber f x e': hfiber f (f x)
d3:= d2g f x xe': x = x → f x = f x
ee: x = x
maponpaths f (! ee) = maponpaths f (! ee) @ e'

        apply (pathsinv0 (pathscomp0rid _)).
      
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: ∏ x : X, isofhlevelf (S n) (maponpaths f)
x: X
e':= idpath (f x): f x = f x
xe', xe:= make_hfiber f x e': hfiber f (f x)
d3:= d2g f x xe': x = x → f x = f x
h: ∏ ee : x = x, maponpaths f (! ee) = d2g f x xe' ee
isofhlevelf (S n) (d2g f x xe')

      
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: ∏ x : X, isofhlevelf (S n) (maponpaths f)
x: X
e':= idpath (f x): f x = f x
xe', xe:= make_hfiber f x e': hfiber f (f x)
d3:= d2g f x xe': x = x → f x = f x
h: ∏ ee : x = x, maponpaths f (! ee) = d2g f x xe' ee
is2: isofhlevelf (S n) (λ ee : x = x, maponpaths f (! ee))
isofhlevelf (S n) (d2g f x xe')

      apply (isofhlevelfhomot (S n) _ _  h is2).
    
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: ∏ x : X, isofhlevelf (S n) (maponpaths f)
x: X
e':= idpath (f x): f x = f x
xe', xe:= make_hfiber f x e': hfiber f (f x)
d3:= d2g f x xe': x = x → f x = f x
is1: isofhlevelf (S n) (d2g f x xe')
isofhlevel (S n) (x,, e' = x,, e')

    apply (isofhlevelweqb (S n) (ezweq3g f x xe' e') (is1 e')).
  
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: ∏ x : X, isofhlevelf (S n) (maponpaths f)
y: Y
X1: ∏ xe0 : hfiber f y, isofhlevel (S n) (xe0 = xe0)
isofhlevel (S (S n)) (hfiber f y)

  
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: ∏ x : X, isofhlevelf (S n) (maponpaths f)
y: Y
X1: ∏ xe0 : hfiber f y, isofhlevel (S n) (xe0 = xe0)
∏ x : hfiber f y, isofhlevel (S n) (x = x)

  assumption.
Defined.



(** ** h -levels of [ pr1 ], fiber inclusions, fibers, total spaces and bases of fibrations *)


(** *** h-levelf of [ pr1 ] *)



n: nat
X: UU
P: X → UU
is: ∏ x : X, isofhlevel n (P x)

∏ y : X, isofhlevel n (hfiber pr1 y)
 
n: nat
X: UU
P: X → UU
is: ∏ x : X, isofhlevel n (P x)
x: X
isofhlevel n (hfiber pr1 x)

  apply (isofhlevelweqf n (ezweqpr1  _ x) (is x)).
Defined.


Z: UU
P: Z → UU
is1: ∏ z : Z, iscontr (P z)
isweq pr1


Z: UU
P: Z → UU
is1: ∏ z : Z, iscontr (P z)
isweq pr1

  
Z: UU
P: Z → UU
is1: ∏ z : Z, iscontr (P z)
isweq pr1
 
Z: UU

∏ y : Z, iscontr (hfiber pr1 y)
 
Z: UU

is1: ∏ z : Z, iscontr (P z)
y: Z
iscontr (hfiber pr1 y)

  
Z: UU
P: Z → UU
is1: ∏ z : Z, iscontr (P z)
y: Z
isy:= is1 y: iscontr (P y)
iscontr (hfiber pr1 y)
 
Z: UU
P: Z → UU
is1: ∏ z : Z, iscontr (P z)
y: Z
isy:= is1 y: iscontr (P y)
iscontr (P y)

  assumption.
Defined.

Definition weqpr1 {Z : UU} (P : Z -> UU) (is : ∏ z : Z , iscontr (P z)) :
  weq (total2 P) Z := make_weq _ (isweqpr1 P is).




(** *** h-level of the total space [ total2 ] *)

is2: isofhlevel n Y
X → isofhlevel n Y

 assumption.
Defined.
















(** ** Propositions, inclusions  and sets *)







(** *** Basics about types of h-level 1 - "propositions" *)


Definition isaprop := isofhlevel 1.

Definition isPredicate {X : UU} (Y : X -> UU) := ∏ x : X, isaprop (Y x).

Definition isapropunit : isaprop unit := iscontrpathsinunit.

Definition isapropdirprod (X Y : UU) : isaprop X -> isaprop Y -> isaprop (X × Y)
  := isofhleveldirprod 1 X Y.


X: UU
is: iscontr X
isaprop X


X: UU
is: iscontr X
isaprop X

  
X: UU
is: iscontr X
isaprop X
 
X: UU
is: iscontr X
f:= λ _ : X, tt: X → unit
isaprop X

  
X: UU
is: iscontr X
f:= λ _ : X, tt: X → unit
isw: isweq f
isaprop X

  
X: UU
is: iscontr X
f:= λ _ : X, tt: X → unit
isw: isweq f
isofhlevel 1 unit

  
X: UU
is: iscontr X
f:= λ _ : X, tt: X → unit
isw: isweq f
x, x': unit
isofhlevel 0 (x = x')

  apply iscontrpathsinunit.
Defined.


n: nat
T: UU
is: isofhlevel n T
isofhlevel (S n) T


n: nat
T: UU
is: isofhlevel n T
isofhlevel (S n) T

  
n: nat
∏ T : UU, isofhlevel n T → isofhlevel (S n) T

  
∏ T : UU, isofhlevel 0 T → isofhlevel 1 T
n: nat
IHn: ∏ T : UU, isofhlevel n T → isofhlevel (S n) T
∏ T : UU, isofhlevel (S n) T → isofhlevel (S (S n)) T

  
∏ T : UU, isofhlevel 0 T → isofhlevel 1 T
 
T: UU
isofhlevel 0 T → isofhlevel 1 T
 apply isapropifcontr.
  
n: nat
IHn: ∏ T : UU, isofhlevel n T → isofhlevel (S n) T
∏ T : UU, isofhlevel (S n) T → isofhlevel (S (S n)) T

isofhlevel (S n) T → isofhlevel (S (S n)) T

∏ t1 t2 : T, isofhlevel (S n) (t1 = t2)

n: nat
IHn: ∏ T : UU, isofhlevel n T → isofhlevel (S n) T
T: UU

t1, t2: T

n: nat
IHn: ∏ T : UU, isofhlevel n T → isofhlevel (S n) T
T: UU
X: ∏ t1 t2 : T, isofhlevel n (t1 = t2)
t1, t2: T
XX:= X t1 t2: isofhlevel n (t1 = t2)
isofhlevel (S n) (t1 = t2)

    apply (IHn _ XX).
Defined.

isofhlevel n X

X0: iscontr X

Defined.


n: nat

f: X ≃ Y
isofhlevelf n f

f: X ≃ Y
isofhlevelf n f

∏ y : Y, isofhlevel n (hfiber f y)

y: Y
isofhlevel n (hfiber f y)

f: X ≃ Y
y: Y
iscontr (hfiber f y)

  apply (pr2 f).
Defined.


X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
z: Z
fs: fibseqstr f g z
isz: iscontr Z
isweq f


X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
z: Z
fs: fibseqstr f g z
isz: iscontr Z
isweq f

  
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
z: Z
fs: fibseqstr f g z
isz: iscontr Z
isweq f
 apply (isofhlevelfffromZ 0 f g z fs (isapropifcontr isz)).
Defined.


X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
y: Y
is: iscontr Y
hfiber f y ≃ X


X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
y: Y
is: iscontr Y
hfiber f y ≃ X

f: X → Y
y: Y
is: iscontr Y
hfiber f y ≃ X
 
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
y: Y
is: iscontr Y
isweq (hfiberpr1 f y)

  apply (isofhlevelfhfiberpr1 0 f y (hlevelntosn 0 _ is)).
Defined.


X: UU
hfiber (λ _ : X, tt) tt ≃ X


X: UU
hfiber (λ _ : X, tt) tt ≃ X

  apply (weqhfibertocontr _ tt iscontrunit).
Defined.


n: nat
X: UU
isofhlevel n X → isofhlevelf n (λ _ : X, tt)


n: nat
X: UU
isofhlevel n X → isofhlevelf n (λ _ : X, tt)

n: nat
X: UU
is: isofhlevel n X
isofhlevel n (hfiber (λ _ : X, tt) tt)

  apply (isofhlevelweqb n (weqhfibertounit X) is).
Defined.


n: nat
X: UU
isofhlevelf n (λ _ : X, tt) → isofhlevel n X


n: nat
X: UU
isofhlevelf n (λ _ : X, tt) → isofhlevel n X

X: UU
is: isofhlevelf n (λ _ : X, tt)
isofhlevel n X
 apply (isofhlevelweqf n (weqhfibertounit X) (is tt)).
Defined.


X, Z: UU
i: X → Z
z: Z
(∑ x : X, hfiber (λ _ : unit, z) (i x)) ≃ hfiber i z


X, Z: UU
i: X → Z
z: Z
(∑ x : X, hfiber (λ _ : unit, z) (i x)) ≃ hfiber i z

  
X, Z: UU
i: X → Z
z: Z
(∑ x : X, hfiber (λ _ : unit, z) (i x)) ≃ hfiber i z
 
X, Z: UU
i: X → Z
z: Z
(∑ x : X, hfiber (λ _ : unit, z) (i x)) → hfiber i z
X, Z: UU

hfiber i z → ∑ x : X, hfiber (λ _ : unit, z) (i x)
X, Z: UU

z: Z
∏ x : ∑ x : X, hfiber (λ _ : unit, z) (i x),
?g (?f x) = x
X, Z: UU

z: Z
∏ y : hfiber i z, ?f (?g y) = y

  
X, Z: UU
i: X → Z
z: Z
(∑ x : X, hfiber (λ _ : unit, z) (i x)) → hfiber i z
 
X, Z: UU
i: X → Z
z: Z
x: X
t: unit
e: z = i x
hfiber i z
 exact (x,,!e).
  
X, Z: UU
i: X → Z
z: Z
hfiber i z → ∑ x : X, hfiber (λ _ : unit, z) (i x)
 
X, Z: UU
i: X → Z
z: Z
x: X
e: i x = z
∑ x : X, hfiber (λ _ : unit, z) (i x)
 exact (x,,tt,,!e).
  
X, Z: UU
i: X → Z
z: Z
∏ x : ∑ x : X, hfiber (λ _ : unit, z) (i x),
(λ X0 : hfiber i z,
 (λ (x0 : X) (e : i x0 = z), x0,, tt,, ! e) (pr1 X0)
   (pr2 X0))
  ((λ X0 : ∑ x0 : X, hfiber (λ _ : unit, z) (i x0),
    (λ (x0 : X) (pr2 : hfiber (λ _ : unit, z) (i x0)),
     (λ (_ : unit) (e : z = i x0), x0,, ! e) (pr1 pr2)
       (Preamble.pr2 pr2)) (pr1 X0) (pr2 X0)) x) = x
 
X, Z: UU
i: X → Z
z: Z
x: X
t: unit
e: z = i x
x,, tt,, ! (! e) = x,, t,, e
 
X, Z: UU
i: X → Z
z: Z
x: X
t: unit
e: z = i x
tt,, ! (! e) = t,, e
 
X, Z: UU
i: X → Z
z: Z
x: X
t: unit
e: z = i x
tt = t
X, Z: UU
i: X → Z
z: Z
x: X
t: unit
e: z = i x
transportf (λ _ : unit, z = i x) ?p (! (! e)) = e

    
X, Z: UU
i: X → Z
z: Z
x: X
t: unit
e: z = i x
tt = t
 apply isapropunit.
    
X, Z: UU
i: X → Z
z: Z
x: X
t: unit
e: z = i x
transportf (λ _ : unit, z = i x)
  (let X0 := λ x x' : unit, pr1 (isapropunit x x') in
   X0 tt t) (! (! e)) = e
 
X, Z: UU
i: X → Z
z: Z
x: X
t: unit
e: z = i x
transportf (λ _ : unit, z = i x)
  (unit_rect (λ x' : unit, tt = x') (idpath tt) t)
  (! (! e)) = e
 
X, Z: UU
i: X → Z
z: Z
x: X
t: unit
transportf (λ _ : unit, z = z)
  (unit_rect (λ x' : unit, tt = x') (idpath tt) t)
  (! (! idpath z)) = idpath z
 
X, Z: UU
i: X → Z
z: Z
x: X
t: unit
transportf (λ _ : unit, z = z)
  (unit_rect (λ x' : unit, tt = x') (idpath tt) t)
  (idpath z) = idpath z
 
X, Z: UU
i: X → Z
z: Z
x: X
transportf (λ _ : unit, z = z)
  (unit_rect (λ x' : unit, tt = x') (idpath tt) tt)
  (idpath z) = idpath z
 apply idpath.
  
X, Z: UU
i: X → Z
z: Z
∏ y : hfiber i z,
(λ X0 : ∑ x : X, hfiber (λ _ : unit, z) (i x),
 (λ (x : X) (pr2 : hfiber (λ _ : unit, z) (i x)),
  (λ (_ : unit) (e : z = i x), x,, ! e) (pr1 pr2)
    (Preamble.pr2 pr2)) (pr1 X0) (pr2 X0))
  ((λ X0 : hfiber i z,
    (λ (x : X) (e : i x = z), x,, tt,, ! e) (pr1 X0)
      (pr2 X0)) y) = y
 
X, Z: UU
i: X → Z
z: Z
x: X
e: i x = z
x,, ! (! e) = x,, e
 
X, Z: UU
i: X → Z
z: Z
x: X
e: i x = z
! (! e) = e
 apply pathsinv0inv0.
Defined.

X: UU

n: nat
X: UU
is: ∏ x x' : X, iscontr (x = x')
x, x': X
iscontr (x = x')
 apply (is x x').
Defined.

(** A proposition that is inhabited is contractible. *)

X: UU
is: isaprop X
x: X
iscontr X


X: UU
is: isaprop X
x: X
iscontr X

  
X: UU
is: isaprop X
x: X
iscontr X
 
X: UU
is: isaprop X
x: X
∑ cntr : X, ∏ t : X, t = cntr
 
X: UU
is: isaprop X
x: X
∏ t : X, t = x
 
X: UU
is: isaprop X
x, t: X
t = x

  
X: UU
is: isaprop X
x, t: X
t = x

  
X: UU
is: isaprop X
x, t: X
is':= is t x: (fix isofhlevel (n : nat) (X : UU) {struct n} : UU :=
match n with
| 0 => iscontr X
| S m => ∏ x x' : X, isofhlevel m (x = x')
end) 0 (t = x)
t = x

  apply (pr1 is').
Defined.


X: UU
f: X → iscontr X
isaprop X


X: UU
f: X → iscontr X
isaprop X

f: X → iscontr X
X → isofhlevel 1 X
 
X: UU
f: X → iscontr X
x: X
isofhlevel 1 X
 exact (hlevelntosn O X (f x)).
Defined.

Definition isProofIrrelevant (X:UU) := ∏ x y:X, x = y.


X: UU
isaprop X → isProofIrrelevant X


X: UU
isaprop X → isProofIrrelevant X

  
X: UU
is: isaprop X
x, x': X
x = x'
 
X: UU
is: isofhlevel 1 X
x, x': X
x = x'
 
X: UU
is: ∏ x x' : X, iscontr (x = x')
x, x': X
x = x'
 exact (iscontrpr1 (is x x')).
Defined.


X: UU
isProofIrrelevant X → isaprop X


X: UU
isProofIrrelevant X → isaprop X

  
X: UU
ee: isProofIrrelevant X
x, x': X
isofhlevel 0 (x = x')
 
X: UU
ee: isProofIrrelevant X
x, x': X
iscontr X
 
X: UU
ee: isProofIrrelevant X
x, x': X
∏ t : X, t = x
 
X: UU
ee: isProofIrrelevant X
x, x', t: X
t = x
 exact (ee t x).
Defined.


X: UU
irr: isProofIrrelevant X
x, y: X
isProofIrrelevant (x = y)


X: UU
irr: isProofIrrelevant X
x, y: X
isProofIrrelevant (x = y)

  
X: UU
irr: isProofIrrelevant X
x, y: X
p, q: x = y
p = q
 
X: UU
irr: isProofIrrelevant X
x, y: X
p, q: x = y
r: (fix isofhlevel (n : nat) (X : UU) {struct n} :
     UU :=
   match n with
   | 0 => iscontr X
   | S m => ∏ x x' : X, isofhlevel m (x = x')
   end) 0 (x = y)
p = q
 exact (pr2 r p @ ! pr2 r q).
Defined.


P, Q: UU
isaprop P → isaprop Q → (P → Q → ∅) → isaprop (P ⨿ Q)


P, Q: UU
isaprop P → isaprop Q → (P → Q → ∅) → isaprop (P ⨿ Q)

  
P, Q: UU
i: isaprop P
j: isaprop Q
n: P → Q → ∅
isaprop (P ⨿ Q)

i: isaprop P
j: isaprop Q
n: P → Q → ∅
isProofIrrelevant (P ⨿ Q)

  
P, Q: UU
i: isaprop P
j: isaprop Q
n: P → Q → ∅
a, b: P ⨿ Q
a = b
 
P, Q: UU
i: isaprop P
j: isaprop Q
n: P → Q → ∅
a, b: P ⨿ Q
equality_cases a b

  
P, Q: UU
i: isaprop P
j: isaprop Q
n: P → Q → ∅
a: P
b: P ⨿ Q
equality_cases (inl a) b
P, Q: UU
i: isaprop P
j: isaprop Q
n: P → Q → ∅
a: Q
b: P ⨿ Q
equality_cases (inr a) b

  
P, Q: UU
i: isaprop P
j: isaprop Q
n: P → Q → ∅
a: P
b: P ⨿ Q
equality_cases (inl a) b
 
P, Q: UU
i: isaprop P
j: isaprop Q
n: P → Q → ∅
a, b: P
equality_cases (inl a) (inl b)
P, Q: UU
i: isaprop P
j: isaprop Q
n: P → Q → ∅
a: P
b: Q
equality_cases (inl a) (inr b)

    
P, Q: UU
i: isaprop P
j: isaprop Q
n: P → Q → ∅
a, b: P
equality_cases (inl a) (inl b)
 apply i.
    
P, Q: UU
i: isaprop P
j: isaprop Q
n: P → Q → ∅
a: P
b: Q
equality_cases (inl a) (inr b)
 contradicts (n a) b.
  
P, Q: UU
i: isaprop P
j: isaprop Q
n: P → Q → ∅
a: Q
b: P ⨿ Q
equality_cases (inr a) b
 
P, Q: UU
i: isaprop P
j: isaprop Q
n: P → Q → ∅
a: Q
b: P
equality_cases (inr a) (inl b)
P, Q: UU
i: isaprop P
j: isaprop Q
n: P → Q → ∅
a, b: Q
equality_cases (inr a) (inr b)

    
P, Q: UU
i: isaprop P
j: isaprop Q
n: P → Q → ∅
a: Q
b: P
equality_cases (inr a) (inl b)
 contradicts (n b) a.
    
P, Q: UU
i: isaprop P
j: isaprop Q
n: P → Q → ∅
a, b: Q
equality_cases (inr a) (inr b)
 apply j.
Defined.


X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → X
isx: isaprop X
isy: isaprop Y
isweq f


X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → X
isx: isaprop X
isy: isaprop Y
isweq f

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → X
isx: isaprop X
isy: isaprop Y
isweq f

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → X
isx: isaprop X
isy: isaprop Y
isx0: ∏ x : X, g (f x) = x
isweq f

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → X
isx: isaprop X
isy: isaprop Y
isx0: ∏ x : X, g (f x) = x
isy0: ∏ y : Y, f (g y) = y
isweq f

  apply (isweq_iso f g isx0 isy0).
Defined.

Definition weqimplimpl {X Y : UU} (f : X -> Y) (g : Y -> X) (isx : isaprop X)
           (isy : isaprop Y) := make_weq _ (isweqimplimpl f g isx isy).

Definition weqiff {X Y : UU} : (X <-> Y) -> isaprop X -> isaprop Y -> X ≃ Y
  := λ f i j, make_weq _ (isweqimplimpl (pr1 f) (pr2 f) i j).

Definition weq_to_iff {X Y : UU} : X ≃ Y -> (X <-> Y)
  := λ f, (pr1weq f ,, invmap f).


isaprop ∅


isaprop ∅

  
isofhlevel 1 ∅
 
∏ x x' : ∅, iscontr (x = x')
 
x, x': ∅
iscontr (x = x')
 induction x.
Defined.

a: X → ∅
isaprop X

a: X → ∅
isaprop X

a: X → ∅
isaprop X
 
X: UU
a: X → ∅
w:= make_weq a (isweqtoempty a): X ≃ ∅
isaprop X

  apply (isofhlevelweqb 1 w isapropempty).
Defined.

 apply h.

p, p': P
g (f p) = g (f p')

f p = f p'

f: P → Q
g: Q → P

isaprop Q
 exact i.

f: P → Q
g: Q → P

P, Q: UU
isaprop (P ⨿ Q) → isaprop P

isaprop (P ⨿ Q) → isaprop P

  (* see also [isofhlevelsnsummand1] *)

i: isaprop (P ⨿ Q)
isaprop P
 
P, Q: UU
i: isaprop (P ⨿ Q)
p, p': P
p = p'

  exact (equality_by_case (proofirrelevance _ i (ii1 p) (ii1 p'))).
Defined.


P, Q: UU
isaprop (P ⨿ Q) → isaprop Q


P, Q: UU
isaprop (P ⨿ Q) → isaprop Q

  (* see also [isofhlevelsnsummand2] *)
  
P, Q: UU
i: isaprop (P ⨿ Q)
isaprop Q
 
P, Q: UU
i: isaprop (P ⨿ Q)
q, q': Q
q = q'

  exact (equality_by_case (proofirrelevance _ i (ii2 q) (ii2 q'))).
Defined.

(** *** Inclusions - functions of h-level 1 *)


Definition isincl {X Y : UU} (f : X -> Y) := isofhlevelf 1 f.

Definition incl (X Y : UU) := total2 (fun f : X -> Y => isincl f).
Definition make_incl {X Y : UU} (f : X -> Y) (is : isincl f) :
  incl X Y := tpair _ f is.
Definition pr1incl (X Y : UU) : incl X Y -> (X -> Y) := @pr1 _ _.
Coercion pr1incl : incl >-> Funclass.


X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
isweq f → isincl f


X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
isweq f → isincl f

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
is: isweq f
isincl f
 apply (isofhlevelfweq 1 (make_weq _ is)).
Defined.
Coercion isinclweq : isweq >-> isincl.


n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
is: isincl f
isofhlevelf (S n) f


n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
is: isincl f
isofhlevelf (S n) f

  
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
is: isincl f
isofhlevelf (S n) f
 
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
is: isincl f
∏ y : Y, isofhlevel (S n) (hfiber f y)
 
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
is: isincl f
y: Y
isofhlevel (S n) (hfiber f y)

  
n: nat
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
is: isincl f
y: Y
isaprop (hfiber f y)

  apply (is y).
Defined.

Definition weqtoincl {X Y : UU} : X ≃ Y -> incl X Y
  := λ w, make_incl (pr1weq w) (pr2 w).


X, Y, Z: UU
f: incl X Y
g: incl Y Z
isincl (pr1 g ∘ pr1 f)


X, Y, Z: UU
f: incl X Y
g: incl Y Z
isincl (pr1 g ∘ pr1 f)

  
X, Y, Z: UU
f: incl X Y
g: incl Y Z
isincl (pr1 g ∘ pr1 f)
 apply (isofhlevelfgf 1 f g (pr2 f) (pr2 g)).
Defined.

Definition inclcomp {X Y Z : UU} (f : incl X Y) (g : incl Y Z) :
  incl X Z := make_incl (funcomp (pr1 f) (pr1 g)) (isinclcomp f g).


X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
isg: isincl g
isgf: isincl (g ∘ f)
isincl f


X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z

isgf: isincl (g ∘ f)
isincl f

  
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
isg: isincl g
isgf: isincl (g ∘ f)
isincl f

  
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
isg: isincl g
isgf: isincl (g ∘ f)
isofhlevelf 2 g

  apply (isofhlevelfsnincl 1 g isg).
Defined.


X, Y, Z: UU
w: X ≃ Y
g: Y → Z
is: isincl (g ∘ w)
isincl g


X, Y, Z: UU
w: X ≃ Y
g: Y → Z
is: isincl (g ∘ w)
isincl g

  
X, Y, Z: UU
w: X ≃ Y
g: Y → Z
is: isincl (g ∘ w)
isincl g
 apply (isofhlevelfgwtog 1 w g is).
Defined.


X, Y, Z: UU
w: X ≃ Y

isincl (g ∘ w)


X, Y, Z: UU
w: X ≃ Y
g: Y → Z
is: isincl g
isincl (g ∘ w)

  
X, Y, Z: UU
w: X ≃ Y
g: Y → Z
is: isincl g
isincl (g ∘ w)
 apply (isofhlevelfgtogw 1 w g is).
Defined.



X, Y: UU
f, g: X → Y
h: f ~ g
isf: isincl f
isincl g


X, Y: UU
f, g: X → Y
h: f ~ g
isf: isincl f
isincl g

  
X, Y: UU
f, g: X → Y
h: f ~ g
isf: isincl f
isincl g
 apply (isofhlevelfhomot (S O) f g h isf).
Defined.



Definition isofhlevelsninclb (n : nat) {X Y : UU} (f : X -> Y) (is : isincl f) :
  isofhlevel (S n) Y -> isofhlevel (S n) X
  := isofhlevelXfromfY (S n) f (isofhlevelfsnincl n f is).

Definition isapropinclb {X Y : UU} (f : X -> Y) (isf : isincl f) :
  isaprop Y -> isaprop X := isofhlevelXfromfY 1 _ isf.



X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
isincl f → ∏ x : X, iscontr (hfiber f (f x))


X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
isincl f → ∏ x : X, iscontr (hfiber f (f x))

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: isincl f
x: X
iscontr (hfiber f (f x))
 
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: isincl f
x: X
iscontr (hfiber f (f x))

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: isincl f
x: X
isy:= X0 (f x): isofhlevel 1 (hfiber f (f x))
iscontr (hfiber f (f x))

  apply (iscontraprop1 isy (make_hfiber f _ (idpath (f x)))).
Defined.

(* see incl_injectivity for the equivalence between isincl and isInjective *)
Definition isInjective {X Y : UU} (f : X -> Y)
  := ∏ (x x' : X), isweq (maponpaths f : x = x' -> f x = f x').


X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
isInjective f → ∏ x x' : X, x = x' ≃ f x = f x'


X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
isInjective f → ∏ x x' : X, x = x' ≃ f x = f x'

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
i: isInjective f
x, x': X
x = x' ≃ f x = f x'
 exact (make_weq _ (i x x')).
Defined.


X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
isincl f → isInjective f


X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
isincl f → isInjective f

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
is: isincl f
x, x': X
isweq (maponpaths f)
 apply (isofhlevelfonpaths O f x x' is).
Defined.

Definition weqonpathsincl {X Y : UU} (f : X -> Y) (is : isincl f) (x x' : X)
  := make_weq _ (isweqonpathsincl f is x x').


X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
isincl f → ∏ x x' : X, f x = f x' → x = x'


X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
isincl f → ∏ x x' : X, f x = f x' → x = x'

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
is: isincl f
x, x': X
f x = f x' → x = x'

  exact (invmap (weqonpathsincl f is x x')).
Defined.


X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
isInjective f → isincl f


X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
isInjective f → isincl f

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
X0: isInjective f
isincl f
 apply (isofhlevelfsn O f X0).
Defined.

Definition isinclpr1 {X : UU} (P : X -> UU) (is : ∏ x : X, isaprop (P x)) :
  isincl (@pr1 X P):= isofhlevelfpr1 (S O) P is.


A: UU
B: A → UU
isPredicate B
→ ∏ x y : ∑ y, B y, x = y ≃ pr1 x = pr1 y


A: UU
B: A → UU
isPredicate B
→ ∏ x y : ∑ y, B y, x = y ≃ pr1 x = pr1 y

  
A: UU
B: A → UU
X: isPredicate B
x, y: ∑ y, B y
x = y ≃ pr1 x = pr1 y
 
A: UU
B: A → UU
X: isPredicate B
x, y: ∑ y, B y
isInjective pr1
 
A: UU
B: A → UU
X: isPredicate B
x, y: ∑ y, B y
isincl pr1
 
A: UU
B: A → UU
X: isPredicate B
x, y: ∑ y, B y
∏ x : A, isaprop (B x)
 exact X.
Defined.


A: UU
B: A → UU
is: isPredicate B
s, s': ∑ x : A, B x
pr1 s = pr1 s' → s = s'


A: UU
B: A → UU
is: isPredicate B
s, s': ∑ x : A, B x
pr1 s = pr1 s' → s = s'

  
A: UU
B: A → UU
is: isPredicate B
s, s': ∑ x : A, B x
e: pr1 s = pr1 s'
s = s'
 
A: UU
B: A → UU
is: isPredicate B
s, s': ∑ x : A, B x
e: pr1 s = pr1 s'
transportf B e (pr2 s) = pr2 s'
 apply is.
Defined.


A: UU
B: A → UU
s, s': ∑ x : A, B x
pr1 s = pr1 s' → isaprop (B (pr1 s')) → s = s'


A: UU
B: A → UU
s, s': ∑ x : A, B x
pr1 s = pr1 s' → isaprop (B (pr1 s')) → s = s'

  
A: UU
B: A → UU
s, s': ∑ x : A, B x
e: pr1 s = pr1 s'
is: isaprop (B (pr1 s'))
s = s'
 
A: UU
B: A → UU
s, s': ∑ x : A, B x
e: pr1 s = pr1 s'
is: isaprop (B (pr1 s'))
transportf B e (pr2 s) = pr2 s'
 apply is.
Defined.

(* This corollary of subtypePath is used for categories. *)

A: UU
B: A → UU
x: A
b: B x
h: ∏ y : A, isaprop (B y)
H: ∏ y : A, B y → y = x
∃! t : A, B t


A: UU
B: A → UU
x: A
b: B x
h: ∏ y : A, isaprop (B y)
H: ∏ y : A, B y → y = x
∃! t : A, B t

  
A: UU
B: A → UU
x: A
b: B x
h: ∏ y : A, isaprop (B y)
H: ∏ y : A, B y → y = x
∑ t : A, B t
A: UU
B: A → UU
x: A
b: B x
h: ∏ y : A, isaprop (B y)
H: ∏ y : A, B y → y = x
∏ t : ∑ t : A, B t, t = ?x

  
A: UU
B: A → UU
x: A
b: B x
h: ∏ y : A, isaprop (B y)
H: ∏ y : A, B y → y = x
∑ t : A, B t
 exact (x,,b).
  
A: UU
B: A → UU
x: A
b: B x
h: ∏ y : A, isaprop (B y)
H: ∏ y : A, B y → y = x
∏ t : ∑ t : A, B t, t = x,, b
 
A: UU
B: A → UU
x: A
b: B x
h: ∏ y : A, isaprop (B y)
H: ∏ y : A, B y → y = x
t: ∑ t : A, B t
t = x,, b
 
A: UU
B: A → UU
x: A
b: B x
h: ∏ y : A, isaprop (B y)
H: ∏ y : A, B y → y = x
t: ∑ t : A, B t
isPredicate B
A: UU
B: A → UU
x: A
b: B x
h: ∏ y : A, isaprop (B y)
H: ∏ y : A, B y → y = x
t: ∑ t : A, B t
pr1 t = pr1 (x,, b)

    
A: UU
B: A → UU
x: A
b: B x
h: ∏ y : A, isaprop (B y)
H: ∏ y : A, B y → y = x
t: ∑ t : A, B t
isPredicate B
 exact h.
    
A: UU
B: A → UU
x: A
b: B x
h: ∏ y : A, isaprop (B y)
H: ∏ y : A, B y → y = x
t: ∑ t : A, B t
pr1 t = pr1 (x,, b)
 
A: UU
B: A → UU
x: A
b: B x
h: ∏ y : A, isaprop (B y)
H: ∏ y : A, B y → y = x
t: ∑ t : A, B t
B (pr1 t)
 exact (pr2 t).
Defined.


X: UU
P: X → UU
is: isPredicate P
x, y: X
p: P x
q: P y
x = y → x,, p = y,, q


X: UU
P: X → UU
is: isPredicate P
x, y: X
p: P x
q: P y
x = y → x,, p = y,, q

  
X: UU
P: X → UU
is: isPredicate P
x, y: X
p: P x
q: P y
e: x = y
x,, p = y,, q
 
X: UU
P: X → UU
is: isPredicate P
x, y: X
p: P x
q: P y
e: x = y
transportf P e p = q
 apply is.
Defined.


X: UU
P: X → UU
x, y: X
p: P x
q: P y
x = y → isaprop (P y) → x,, p = y,, q

(* This variant of subtypePairEquality is never needed. *)

X: UU
P: X → UU
x, y: X
p: P x
q: P y
x = y → isaprop (P y) → x,, p = y,, q

  
X: UU
P: X → UU
x, y: X
p: P x
q: P y
e: x = y
is: isaprop (P y)
x,, p = y,, q
 
X: UU
P: X → UU
x, y: X
p: P x
q: P y
e: x = y
is: isaprop (P y)
transportf P e p = q
 apply is.
Defined.


X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
is1: isincl g
y: Y
hfiber f y ≃ hfiber (g ∘ f) (g y)


X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
is1: isincl g
y: Y
hfiber f y ≃ hfiber (g ∘ f) (g y)

  
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
is1: isincl g
y: Y
hfiber f y ≃ hfiber (g ∘ f) (g y)
 
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
is1: isincl g
y: Y
isweq
  (hfibersftogf f g (g y)
     (make_hfiber g y (idpath (g y))))

  
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
is1: isincl g
y: Y
z:= g y: Z
isweq
  (hfibersftogf f g z (make_hfiber g y (idpath z)))
 
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
is1: isincl g
y: Y
z:= g y: Z
ye:= make_hfiber g y (idpath (g y)): hfiber g (g y)
isweq
  (hfibersftogf f g z (make_hfiber g y (idpath z)))
 
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
is1: isincl g
y: Y
z:= g y: Z
ye:= make_hfiber g y (idpath (g y)): hfiber g (g y)
xe: hfiber (g ∘ f) z
iscontr
  (hfiber
     (hfibersftogf f g z (make_hfiber g y (idpath z)))
     xe)

  
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
is1: isincl g
y: Y
z:= g y: Z
ye:= make_hfiber g y (idpath (g y)): hfiber g (g y)
xe: hfiber (g ∘ f) z
hfibersgftog f g z xe = ye
≃ hfiber
    (hfibersftogf f g z (make_hfiber g y (idpath z)))
    xe
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
is1: isincl g
y: Y
z:= g y: Z
ye:= make_hfiber g y (idpath (g y)): hfiber g (g y)
xe: hfiber (g ∘ f) z
iscontr (hfibersgftog f g z xe = ye)

  
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
is1: isincl g
y: Y
z:= g y: Z
ye:= make_hfiber g y (idpath (g y)): hfiber g (g y)
xe: hfiber (g ∘ f) z
hfibersgftog f g z xe = ye
≃ hfiber
    (hfibersftogf f g z (make_hfiber g y (idpath z)))
    xe
 
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
is1: isincl g
y: Y
z:= g y: Z
ye:= make_hfiber g y (idpath (g y)): hfiber g (g y)
xe: hfiber (g ∘ f) z
isweq
  (ezmap
     (d1 (hfibersftogf f g z ye) (hfibersgftog f g z)
        ye (fibseqhf f g z ye) xe)
     (hfibersftogf f g z ye) xe
     (fibseq1 (hfibersftogf f g z ye)
        (hfibersgftog f g z) ye (fibseqhf f g z ye) xe))

    exact (isweqezmap1 _ _ _ _ _). 
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
is1: isincl g
y: Y
z:= g y: Z
ye:= make_hfiber g y (idpath (g y)): hfiber g (g y)
xe: hfiber (g ∘ f) z
iscontr (hfibersgftog f g z xe = ye)

  
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
is1: isincl g
y: Y
z:= g y: Z
ye:= make_hfiber g y (idpath (g y)): hfiber g (g y)
xe: hfiber (g ∘ f) z
iscontr (hfiber g z)
 
X, Y, Z: UU
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
is1: isincl g
y: Y
z:= g y: Z
ye:= make_hfiber g y (idpath (g y)): hfiber g (g y)
xe: hfiber (g ∘ f) z
isincl g
 exact is1.
Defined.

(** *** Basics about types of h-level 2 - "sets" *)

Definition isaset (X : UU) : UU := ∏ x x' : X, isaprop (x = x').

(* Definition isaset := isofhlevel 2. *)

Notation isasetdirprod := (isofhleveldirprod 2).


isaset unit


isaset unit

  apply (isofhlevelcontr 2 iscontrunit).
Defined.


isaset ∅


isaset ∅

  apply (isofhlevelsnprop 1 isapropempty).
Defined.


X: UU
is: iscontr X
isaset X


X: UU
is: iscontr X
isaset X

  
X: UU
is: iscontr X
isaset X
 apply (isofhlevelcontr 2 is).
Defined.


X: UU
is: isaprop X
isaset X


X: UU
is: isaprop X
isaset X

  
X: UU
is: isaprop X
isaset X
 apply (isofhlevelsnprop 1 is).
Defined.


X: UU
P: X → UU
isaset X
→ (∏ x : X, isaset (P x)) → isaset (∑ x : X, P x)


X: UU
P: X → UU
isaset X
→ (∏ x : X, isaset (P x)) → isaset (∑ x : X, P x)

  
X: UU
P: X → UU
X0: isaset X
X1: ∏ x : X, isaset (P x)
isaset (∑ x : X, P x)
 apply (isofhleveltotal2 2); assumption.
Defined.


X, Y: UU
isaset X → isaset Y → isaset (X × Y)


X, Y: UU
isaset X → isaset Y → isaset (X × Y)

  
X, Y: UU
X0: isaset X
X1: isaset Y
isaset (X × Y)
 
X, Y: UU
X0: isaset X
X1: isaset Y
isaset X
X, Y: UU
X0: isaset X
X1: isaset Y
X → isaset Y
 
X, Y: UU
X0: isaset X
X1: isaset Y
X → isaset Y
 
X, Y: UU
X0: isaset X
X1: isaset Y
x: X
isaset Y
 assumption.
Defined.


X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
y: Y
isaset X → isaset Y → isaset (hfiber f y)


X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
y: Y
isaset X → isaset Y → isaset (hfiber f y)

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
y: Y
isX: isaset X
isY: isaset Y
isaset (hfiber f y)
 
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
y: Y
isX: isaset X
isY: isaset Y
isaset X
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
y: Y
isX: isaset X
isY: isaset Y
∏ x : X, isaset (f x = y)
 
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
y: Y
isX: isaset X
isY: isaset Y
∏ x : X, isaset (f x = y)
 
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
y: Y
isX: isaset X
isY: isaset Y
x: X
isaset (f x = y)
 
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
y: Y
isX: isaset X
isY: isaset Y
x: X
isaprop (f x = y)
 apply isY.
Defined.

(** The following lemma asserts "uniqueness of identity proofs" (uip) for
  sets. *)


X: UU
is: isaset X
x, x': X
e, e': x = x'
e = e'


X: UU
is: isaset X
x, x': X
e, e': x = x'
e = e'

  
X: UU
is: isaset X
x, x': X
e, e': x = x'
e = e'
 apply (proofirrelevance _ (is x x') e e').
Defined.

(** For the theorem about the coproduct of two sets see [ isasetcoprod ]
  below. *)



n: nat
X: UU
is: isaset X
isofhlevel (S (S n)) X


n: nat
X: UU
is: isaset X
isofhlevel (S (S n)) X

  
n: nat
X: UU
is: isaset X
∏ (x x' : X) (x0 x'0 : x = x'),
isofhlevel n (x0 = x'0)
 
n: nat
X: UU
is: ∏ x x' : X, isaprop (x = x')
∏ (x x' : X) (x0 x'0 : x = x'),
isofhlevel n (x0 = x'0)
 
n: nat
X: UU
is: ∏ x x' : X, isaprop (x = x')
x, x': X
∏ x0 x'0 : x = x', isofhlevel n (x0 = x'0)

  
n: nat
X: UU
is: ∏ x x' : X, isaprop (x = x')
x, x': X
isaprop (x = x')

  exact (is x x').
Defined.


X: UU
(∏ x : X, iscontr (x = x)) → isaset X


X: UU
(∏ x : X, iscontr (x = x)) → isaset X

  
X: UU
X0: ∏ x : X, iscontr (x = x)
isaset X
 
X: UU
X0: ∏ x : X, iscontr (x = x)
∏ x x' : X, isaprop (x = x')
 
X: UU
X0: ∏ x : X, iscontr (x = x)
∏ x x' : X, isaprop (x = x')
 
X: UU
X0: ∏ x : X, iscontr (x = x)
x, x': X
x0, x0': x = x'
isofhlevel 0 (x0 = x0')

  
X: UU
X0: ∏ x : X, iscontr (x = x)
x: X
x0': x = x
isofhlevel 0 (idpath x = x0')

  
X: UU
X0: ∏ x : X, iscontr (x = x)
x: X
x0': x = x
iscontr (x = x)

  exact (X0 x).
Defined.


X: UU
isaset X → ∏ x : X, iscontr (x = x)


X: UU
isaset X → ∏ x : X, iscontr (x = x)

  
X: UU
X0: isaset X
x: X
iscontr (x = x)
 
X: UU
X0: ∏ x x' : X, isaprop (x = x')
x: X
iscontr (x = x)
 
X: UU
X0: ∏ x x' : X, isaprop (x = x')
x: X
iscontr (x = x)

  
X: UU
X0: ∏ x x' : X, isaprop (x = x')
x: X
iscontr (x = x)

  apply (iscontraprop1 (X0 x x) (idpath x)).
Defined.



(**  A monic subtype of a set is a set. *)


X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
is1: isaset Y
is2: isincl f
isaset X


X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
is1: isaset Y
is2: isincl f
isaset X

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
is1: isaset Y
is2: isincl f
isaset X
 
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
is1: isaset Y
is2: isincl f
isofhlevel 2 Y
 apply is1.
Defined.



(** The morphism from hfiber of a map to a set is an inclusion. *)


X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
is: isaset Y
y: Y
isincl pr1


X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
is: isaset Y
y: Y
isincl pr1

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
is: isaset Y
y: Y
isincl pr1
 
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
is: isaset Y
y: Y
isofhlevel 2 Y
 assumption.
Defined.


(** Criterion for a function between sets being an inclusion.  *)



X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
isx: isaset X
isy: isaset Y
inj: ∏ x x' : X, f x = f x' → x = x'
isincl f


X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
isx: isaset X
isy: isaset Y
inj: ∏ x x' : X, f x = f x' → x = x'
isincl f

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
isx: isaset X
isy: isaset Y
inj: ∏ x x' : X, f x = f x' → x = x'
isincl f
 
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
isx: isaset X
isy: isaset Y
inj: ∏ x x' : X, f x = f x' → x = x'
isInjective f
 
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
isx: isaset X
isy: isaset Y
inj: ∏ x x' : X, f x = f x' → x = x'
x, x': X
isweq (maponpaths f)

  apply (isweqimplimpl (@maponpaths _ _ f x x') (inj x x') (isx x x')
                       (isy (f x) (f x'))).
Defined.

(** A map from [ unit ] to a set is an inclusion. *)


X: UU
f: unit → X
is: isaset X
isincl f


X: UU
f: unit → X
is: isaset X
isincl f

  
X: UU
f: unit → X
is: isaset X
isincl f

  
X: UU
f: unit → X
is: isaset X
∏ x x' : unit, f x = f x' → x = x'

  
X: UU
f: unit → X
is: isaset X
x, x': unit
X0: f x = f x'
x = x'
 
X: UU
f: unit → X
is: isaset X
x': unit
X0: f tt = f x'
tt = x'
 
X: UU
f: unit → X
is: isaset X
X0: f tt = f tt
tt = tt
 apply idpath.
Defined.





X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
UniqueConstruction f → isaset Y → isweq f


X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
UniqueConstruction f → isaset Y → isweq f

  (* compare with bijection_to_weq: this one doesn't use isweq_iso *)
  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
bij: UniqueConstruction f
i: isaset Y
y: Y
iscontr (hfiber f y)
 
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
bij: UniqueConstruction f
i: isaset Y
y: Y
sur:= pr1 bij: ∏ y : Y, ∑ x : X, f x = y
inj:= pr2 bij: (λ _ : ∏ y : Y, ∑ x : X, f x = y, ∏ x x' : X, f x = f x' → x = x') (pr1 bij)
iscontr (hfiber f y)

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
bij: UniqueConstruction f
i: isaset Y
y: Y
sur:= pr1 bij: ∏ y : Y, ∑ x : X, f x = y
inj:= pr2 bij: (λ _ : ∏ y : Y, ∑ x : X, f x = y, ∏ x x' : X, f x = f x' → x = x') (pr1 bij)
hfiber f y
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
bij: UniqueConstruction f
i: isaset Y
y: Y
sur:= pr1 bij: ∏ y : Y, ∑ x : X, f x = y
inj:= pr2 bij: (λ _ : ∏ y : Y, ∑ x : X, f x = y, ∏ x x' : X, f x = f x' → x = x') (pr1 bij)
(λ cntr : hfiber f y, ∏ t : hfiber f y, t = cntr) ?pr1

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
bij: UniqueConstruction f
i: isaset Y
y: Y
sur:= pr1 bij: ∏ y : Y, ∑ x : X, f x = y
inj:= pr2 bij: (λ _ : ∏ y : Y, ∑ x : X, f x = y, ∏ x x' : X, f x = f x' → x = x') (pr1 bij)
hfiber f y
 
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
bij: UniqueConstruction f
i: isaset Y
y: Y
sur:= pr1 bij: ∏ y : Y, ∑ x : X, f x = y
inj:= pr2 bij: (λ _ : ∏ y : Y, ∑ x : X, f x = y, ∏ x x' : X, f x = f x' → x = x') (pr1 bij)
f (pr1 (sur y)) = y
 exact (pr2 (sur y)).
  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
bij: UniqueConstruction f
i: isaset Y
y: Y
sur:= pr1 bij: ∏ y : Y, ∑ x : X, f x = y
inj:= pr2 bij: (λ _ : ∏ y : Y, ∑ x : X, f x = y, ∏ x x' : X, f x = f x' → x = x') (pr1 bij)
(λ cntr : hfiber f y, ∏ t : hfiber f y, t = cntr)
  (pr1 (sur y),, pr2 (sur y))
 
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
bij: UniqueConstruction f
i: isaset Y
y: Y
sur:= pr1 bij: ∏ y : Y, ∑ x : X, f x = y
inj:= pr2 bij: (λ _ : ∏ y : Y, ∑ x : X, f x = y, ∏ x x' : X, f x = f x' → x = x') (pr1 bij)
w: hfiber f y
w = pr1 (sur y),, pr2 (sur y)

    
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
bij: UniqueConstruction f
i: isaset Y
y: Y
sur:= pr1 bij: ∏ y : Y, ∑ x : X, f x = y
inj:= pr2 bij: (λ _ : ∏ y : Y, ∑ x : X, f x = y, ∏ x x' : X, f x = f x' → x = x') (pr1 bij)
w: hfiber f y
pr1 w = pr1 (pr1 (sur y),, pr2 (sur y))
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
bij: UniqueConstruction f
i: isaset Y
y: Y
sur:= pr1 bij: ∏ y : Y, ∑ x : X, f x = y
inj:= pr2 bij: (λ _ : ∏ y : Y, ∑ x : X, f x = y, ∏ x x' : X, f x = f x' → x = x') (pr1 bij)
w: hfiber f y
transportf (λ x : X, f x = y) ?p (pr2 w) =
pr2 (pr1 (sur y),, pr2 (sur y))

    
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
bij: UniqueConstruction f
i: isaset Y
y: Y
sur:= pr1 bij: ∏ y : Y, ∑ x : X, f x = y
inj:= pr2 bij: (λ _ : ∏ y : Y, ∑ x : X, f x = y, ∏ x x' : X, f x = f x' → x = x') (pr1 bij)
w: hfiber f y
pr1 w = pr1 (pr1 (sur y),, pr2 (sur y))
 
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
bij: UniqueConstruction f
i: isaset Y
y: Y
sur:= pr1 bij: ∏ y : Y, ∑ x : X, f x = y
inj:= pr2 bij: (λ _ : ∏ y : Y, ∑ x : X, f x = y, ∏ x x' : X, f x = f x' → x = x') (pr1 bij)
w: hfiber f y
pr1 w = pr1 (sur y)
 
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
bij: UniqueConstruction f
i: isaset Y
y: Y
sur:= pr1 bij: ∏ y : Y, ∑ x : X, f x = y
inj:= pr2 bij: (λ _ : ∏ y : Y, ∑ x : X, f x = y, ∏ x x' : X, f x = f x' → x = x') (pr1 bij)
w: hfiber f y
f (pr1 w) = f (pr1 (sur y))
 
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
bij: UniqueConstruction f
i: isaset Y
y: Y
sur:= pr1 bij: ∏ y : Y, ∑ x : X, f x = y
inj:= pr2 bij: (λ _ : ∏ y : Y, ∑ x : X, f x = y, ∏ x x' : X, f x = f x' → x = x') (pr1 bij)
w: hfiber f y
f (pr1 w) = y
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
bij: UniqueConstruction f
i: isaset Y
y: Y
sur:= pr1 bij: ∏ y : Y, ∑ x : X, f x = y
inj:= pr2 bij: (λ _ : ∏ y : Y, ∑ x : X, f x = y, ∏ x x' : X, f x = f x' → x = x') (pr1 bij)
w: hfiber f y
y = f (pr1 (sur y))

      
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
bij: UniqueConstruction f
i: isaset Y
y: Y
sur:= pr1 bij: ∏ y : Y, ∑ x : X, f x = y
inj:= pr2 bij: (λ _ : ∏ y : Y, ∑ x : X, f x = y, ∏ x x' : X, f x = f x' → x = x') (pr1 bij)
w: hfiber f y
f (pr1 w) = y
 exact (pr2 w).
      
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
bij: UniqueConstruction f
i: isaset Y
y: Y
sur:= pr1 bij: ∏ y : Y, ∑ x : X, f x = y
inj:= pr2 bij: (λ _ : ∏ y : Y, ∑ x : X, f x = y, ∏ x x' : X, f x = f x' → x = x') (pr1 bij)
w: hfiber f y
y = f (pr1 (sur y))
 exact (! pr2 (sur y)).
    
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
bij: UniqueConstruction f
i: isaset Y
y: Y
sur:= pr1 bij: ∏ y : Y, ∑ x : X, f x = y
inj:= pr2 bij: (λ _ : ∏ y : Y, ∑ x : X, f x = y, ∏ x x' : X, f x = f x' → x = x') (pr1 bij)
w: hfiber f y
transportf (λ x : X, f x = y)
  (inj (pr1 w) (pr1 (sur y)) (pr2 w @ ! pr2 (sur y))
   :
   pr1 w = pr1 (pr1 (sur y),, pr2 (sur y))) (pr2 w) =
pr2 (pr1 (sur y),, pr2 (sur y))
 
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
bij: UniqueConstruction f
i: isaset Y
y: Y
sur:= pr1 bij: ∏ y : Y, ∑ x : X, f x = y
inj:= pr2 bij: (λ _ : ∏ y : Y, ∑ x : X, f x = y, ∏ x x' : X, f x = f x' → x = x') (pr1 bij)
x: X
e: f x = y
transportf (λ x : X, f x = y)
  (inj x (pr1 (sur y)) (e @ ! pr2 (sur y))) e =
pr2 (sur y)
 
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
bij: UniqueConstruction f
i: isaset Y
sur:= pr1 bij: ∏ y : Y, ∑ x : X, f x = y
inj:= pr2 bij: (λ _ : ∏ y : Y, ∑ x : X, f x = y, ∏ x x' : X, f x = f x' → x = x') (pr1 bij)
x: X
transportf (λ x0 : X, f x0 = f x)
  (inj x (pr1 (sur (f x)))
     (idpath (f x) @ ! pr2 (sur (f x))))
  (idpath (f x)) = pr2 (sur (f x))

      apply i.
Defined.

(** Complementary types *)

Definition complementary P Q := (P -> Q -> ∅) × (P ⨿ Q).


P, Q: Type
complementary P Q → ¬ P <-> Q


P, Q: Type
complementary P Q → ¬ P <-> Q

  
P, Q: Type
c: complementary P Q
¬ P <-> Q

¬ P → Q

Q → ¬ P

c: P ⨿ Q
¬ P → Q

Q

Q
 contradicts p np.

np: ¬ P
Q
 exact q.

Q → ¬ P

q: Q
¬ P

¬ P

p: P

∅
 exact (n p q).
    
P, Q: Type
n: P → Q → ∅
q: Q
¬ P
 
P, Q: Type
n: P → Q → ∅
q: Q
p: P
∅
 exact (n p q).
Defined.

Definition decidable (X:UU) := X ⨿ ¬X.


X: UU
decidable X → complementary X (¬ X)


X: UU
decidable X → complementary X (¬ X)

  
X: UU
d: decidable X
complementary X (¬ X)

x: X
n: ¬ X
∅
 exact (n x).
  
X: UU
d: decidable X
X ⨿ ¬ X
 exact d.
Defined.

(** *** Decidable propositions [ isdecprop ] *)

Definition isdecprop (P:UU) := (P ⨿ ¬P) × isaprop P.

Definition isdecproptoisaprop ( X : UU ) ( is : isdecprop X ) : isaprop X := pr2 is.
Coercion isdecproptoisaprop : isdecprop >-> isaprop .


X: UU
isaprop X → X ⨿ ¬ X → isdecprop X


X: UU
isaprop X → X ⨿ ¬ X → isdecprop X

  
X: UU
i: isaprop X
c: X ⨿ ¬ X
isdecprop X
 exact (c,,i).
Defined.


P: UU
iscontr P → isdecprop P


P: UU
iscontr P → isdecprop P

  
P: UU
i: iscontr P
isdecprop P

  
P: UU
i: iscontr P
P ⨿ ¬ P
P: UU
i: iscontr P
isaprop P

  
P: UU
i: iscontr P
P ⨿ ¬ P
 exact (ii1 (iscontrpr1 i)).
  
P: UU
i: iscontr P
isaprop P
 
P: UU
i: iscontr P
iscontr P
 assumption.
Defined.


isdecprop ∅


isdecprop ∅

  
∅ ⨿ ¬ ∅ × isaprop ∅

  
∅ ⨿ ¬ ∅
isaprop ∅

  
∅ ⨿ ¬ ∅
 exact (ii2 (idfun ∅)).
  
isaprop ∅
 exact isapropempty.
Defined.

isy: isaprop Y
lg: X <-> Y
w:= weqimplimpl (pr1 lg) (pr2 lg) isx isy: X ≃ Y
isdecprop Y

  apply (isdecpropweqf w isx).
Defined.

  apply (isdecpropweqb w isy).

Defined.

(** *** Types with decidable equality *)

Definition isdeceq (X:UU) : UU := ∏ (x x':X), decidable (x=x').


X, Y: UU
w: X ≃ Y
is: isdeceq X
isdeceq Y


X, Y: UU
w: X ≃ Y
is: isdeceq X
isdeceq Y

  
X, Y: UU
w: X ≃ Y
is: isdeceq X
isdeceq Y
 
X, Y: UU
w: X ≃ Y
is: isdeceq X
y, y': Y
decidable (y = y')

  
X, Y: UU
w: X ≃ Y
is: isdeceq X
y, y': Y
w':= weqonpaths (invweq w) y y': y = y' ≃ invweq w y = invweq w y'
decidable (y = y')

  
X, Y: UU
w: X ≃ Y
is: isdeceq X
y, y': Y
w':= weqonpaths (invweq w) y y': y = y' ≃ invweq w y = invweq w y'
int:= is (invweq w y) (invweq w y'): decidable (invweq w y = invweq w y')
decidable (y = y')

  
X, Y: UU
w: X ≃ Y
is: isdeceq X
y, y': Y
w':= weqonpaths (invweq w) y y': y = y' ≃ invweq w y = invweq w y'
i: invweq w y = invweq w y'
decidable (y = y')
X, Y: UU
w: X ≃ Y
is: isdeceq X
y, y': Y
w':= weqonpaths (invweq w) y y': y = y' ≃ invweq w y = invweq w y'
ni: invweq w y != invweq w y'
decidable (y = y')

  
X, Y: UU
w: X ≃ Y
is: isdeceq X
y, y': Y
w':= weqonpaths (invweq w) y y': y = y' ≃ invweq w y = invweq w y'
i: invweq w y = invweq w y'
decidable (y = y')
 apply (ii1 ((invweq w') i)).
  
X, Y: UU
w: X ≃ Y
is: isdeceq X
y, y': Y
w':= weqonpaths (invweq w) y y': y = y' ≃ invweq w y = invweq w y'
ni: invweq w y != invweq w y'
decidable (y = y')
 apply (ii2 ((negf w') ni)).
Defined.


X, Y: UU
w: X ≃ Y
is: isdeceq Y
isdeceq X


X, Y: UU
w: X ≃ Y
is: isdeceq Y
isdeceq X

  
X, Y: UU
w: X ≃ Y
is: isdeceq Y
isdeceq X
 apply (isdeceqweqf (invweq w) is).
Defined.


X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
is: isdeceq Y
is': isincl f
isdeceq X


X, Y: UU

isdeceq X

f: X → Y
is: isdeceq Y

isdeceq X
 
X, Y: UU

is: isdeceq Y
is': isincl f
x, x': X
decidable (x = x')

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
is: isdeceq Y
is': isincl f
x, x': X
w:= weqonpathsincl f is' x x': x = x' ≃ f x = f x'
decidable (x = x')
 
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
is: isdeceq Y
is': isincl f
x, x': X
w:= weqonpathsincl f is' x x': x = x' ≃ f x = f x'
int:= is (f x) (f x'): decidable (f x = f x')
decidable (x = x')

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
is: isdeceq Y
is': isincl f
x, x': X
w:= weqonpathsincl f is' x x': x = x' ≃ f x = f x'
i: f x = f x'
decidable (x = x')
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
is: isdeceq Y
is': isincl f
x, x': X
w:= weqonpathsincl f is' x x': x = x' ≃ f x = f x'
ni: f x != f x'
decidable (x = x')

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
is: isdeceq Y
is': isincl f
x, x': X
w:= weqonpathsincl f is' x x': x = x' ≃ f x = f x'
i: f x = f x'
decidable (x = x')
 apply (ii1 ((invweq w) i)).
  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
is: isdeceq Y
is': isincl f
x, x': X
w:= weqonpathsincl f is' x x': x = x' ≃ f x = f x'
ni: f x != f x'
decidable (x = x')
 apply (ii2 ((negf w) ni)).
Defined.


X: UU
isaprop X → isdeceq X


X: UU
isaprop X → isdeceq X

  
X: UU
is: isaprop X
x, x': X
decidable (x = x')
 apply (ii1 (proofirrelevance _ is x x')).
Defined.


X: UU
is: isdeceq X
x, x': X
bool


X: UU
is: isdeceq X
x, x': X
bool

is: isdeceq X
x, x': X
bool

x, x': X
a: x = x'
bool

x, x': X
b: x != x'
bool
 
X: UU
is: isdeceq X
x, x': X
b: x != x'
bool
 apply false.
Defined.


X: UU
is: isdeceq X
x, x': X
¬¬ (x = x') → x = x'


X: UU
is: isdeceq X
x, x': X
¬¬ (x = x') → x = x'

  
X: UU
is: isdeceq X
x, x': X
X0: ¬¬ (x = x')
x = x'
 
X: UU
is: isdeceq X
x, x': X
