y: x = x'
x = x'
X: UU
is: isdeceq X
x, x': X
X0: ¬¬ (x = x')
n: x != x'
x = x'

  
X: UU
is: isdeceq X
x, x': X
X0: ¬¬ (x = x')
y: x = x'
x = x'
 assumption.
  
X: UU
is: isdeceq X
x, x': X
X0: ¬¬ (x = x')
n: x != x'
x = x'
 induction (X0 n).
Defined.


isdeceq unit


isdeceq unit

  apply (isdeceqifisaprop _ isapropunit).
Defined.


isdeceq bool


isdeceq bool

  
∏ x x' : bool, decidable (x = x')
 
x', x: bool
decidable (x' = x)
 
x': bool
decidable (x' = true)
x': bool
decidable (x' = false)

  
x': bool
decidable (x' = true)
 
decidable (true = true)
decidable (false = true)

    
decidable (true = true)
 apply (ii1 (idpath true)).
    
decidable (false = true)
 apply (ii2 nopathsfalsetotrue).
  
x': bool
decidable (x' = false)
 
decidable (true = false)
decidable (false = false)

    
decidable (true = false)
 apply (ii2 nopathstruetofalse).
    
decidable (false = false)
 apply (ii1 (idpath false)).
Defined.


A, B: UU
h1: isdeceq A
h2: isdeceq B
isdeceq (A ⨿ B)


A, B: UU
h1: isdeceq A
h2: isdeceq B
isdeceq (A ⨿ B)


A, B: UU
h1: isdeceq A
h2: isdeceq B
ab, ab': A ⨿ B
decidable (ab = ab')


A, B: UU
h1: isdeceq A
h2: isdeceq B
a, a': A
decidable (inl a = inl a')
A, B: UU
h1: isdeceq A
h2: isdeceq B
a: A
b': B
decidable (inl a = inr b')
A, B: UU
h1: isdeceq A
h2: isdeceq B
b: B
a': A
decidable (inr b = inl a')
A, B: UU
h1: isdeceq A
h2: isdeceq B
b, b': B
decidable (inr b = inr b')


A, B: UU
h1: isdeceq A
h2: isdeceq B
a, a': A
decidable (inl a = inl a')
 
A, B: UU
h1: isdeceq A
h2: isdeceq B
a, a': A
p: a = a'
decidable (inl a = inl a')
A, B: UU
h1: isdeceq A
h2: isdeceq B
a, a': A
p: a != a'
decidable (inl a = inl a')

  
A, B: UU
h1: isdeceq A
h2: isdeceq B
a, a': A
p: a = a'
decidable (inl a = inl a')
 apply inl, (maponpaths (@ii1 A B) p).
  
A, B: UU
h1: isdeceq A
h2: isdeceq B
a, a': A
p: a != a'
decidable (inl a = inl a')
 apply inr; intro H; apply (p (ii1_injectivity _ _ H)).

A, B: UU
h1: isdeceq A
h2: isdeceq B
a: A
b': B
decidable (inl a = inr b')
 apply inr, negpathsii1ii2.

A, B: UU
h1: isdeceq A
h2: isdeceq B
b: B
a': A
decidable (inr b = inl a')
 apply inr, negpathsii2ii1.

A, B: UU
h1: isdeceq A
h2: isdeceq B
b, b': B
decidable (inr b = inr b')
 
A, B: UU
h1: isdeceq A
h2: isdeceq B
b, b': B
p: b = b'
decidable (inr b = inr b')
A, B: UU
h1: isdeceq A
h2: isdeceq B
b, b': B
p: b != b'
decidable (inr b = inr b')

  
A, B: UU
h1: isdeceq A
h2: isdeceq B
b, b': B
p: b = b'
decidable (inr b = inr b')
 apply inl, (maponpaths (@ii2 A B) p).
  
A, B: UU
h1: isdeceq A
h2: isdeceq B
b, b': B
p: b != b'
decidable (inr b = inr b')
 apply inr; intro H; apply (p (ii2_injectivity _ _ H)).
Defined.


(** *** Isolated points *)

Definition isisolated (X:UU) (x:X) := ∏ x':X, (x = x') ⨿ (x != x').

Definition isolated ( T : UU ) := ∑ t:T, isisolated _ t.

Definition make_isolated ( T : UU ) (t:T) (i:isisolated _ t) : isolated T
  := (t,,i).

Definition pr1isolated ( T : UU ) (x:isolated T) : T := pr1 x.


X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
∏ x' : X, isaprop (x = x')


X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
∏ x' : X, isaprop (x = x')

  
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
x': X
isaprop (x = x')
 
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
x': X
x = x' → iscontr (x = x')
 
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
x': X
e: x = x'
iscontr (x = x')
 
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
iscontr (x = x)

  
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
f:= λ e : x = x, coconusfromtpair X e: x = x → coconusfromt X x
iscontr (x = x)

  
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
f:= λ e : x = x, coconusfromtpair X e: x = x → coconusfromt X x
is': isweq f
iscontr (x = x)

  
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
f:= λ e : x = x, coconusfromtpair X e: x = x → coconusfromt X x
is': isweq f
is2: iscontr (coconusfromt X x)
iscontr (x = x)

  
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
f:= λ e : x = x, coconusfromtpair X e: x = x → coconusfromt X x
is': isweq f
is2: iscontr (coconusfromt X x)
iscontr (coconusfromt X x)

  assumption.
Defined.

Local Open Scope transport.


X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
∏ x' : X, isaprop (x' = x)


X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
∏ x' : X, isaprop (x' = x)

  
X: UU
x: X
is: isisolated X x
x': X
isaprop (x' = x)

  apply (isofhlevelweqf 1 (weqpathsinv0 x x')
                        (isaproppathsfromisolated X x is x')).
Defined.


X, Y: UU
f: X ≃ Y
x: X
isisolated X x → isisolated Y (f x)


X, Y: UU
f: X ≃ Y
x: X
isisolated X x → isisolated Y (f x)

  
X, Y: UU
f: X ≃ Y
x: X
is: isisolated X x
isisolated Y (f x)
 
X, Y: UU
f: X ≃ Y
x: X
is: isisolated X x
∏ x' : Y, (f x = x') ⨿ (f x != x')
 
X, Y: UU
f: X ≃ Y
x: X
is: isisolated X x
y: Y
(f x = y) ⨿ (f x != y)

  
X, Y: UU
f: X ≃ Y
x: X
is: isisolated X x
y: Y
eq: x = invmap f y
(f x = y) ⨿ (f x != y)
X, Y: UU
f: X ≃ Y
x: X
is: isisolated X x
y: Y
ne: x != invmap f y
(f x = y) ⨿ (f x != y)

  
X, Y: UU
f: X ≃ Y
x: X
is: isisolated X x
y: Y
eq: x = invmap f y
(f x = y) ⨿ (f x != y)
 
X, Y: UU
f: X ≃ Y
x: X
is: isisolated X x
y: Y
eq: x = invmap f y
f x = y
 
X, Y: UU
f: X ≃ Y
x: X
is: isisolated X x
y: Y
eq: x = invmap f y
x = invmap f y
 assumption. 
X, Y: UU
f: X ≃ Y
x: X
is: isisolated X x
y: Y
ne: x != invmap f y
(f x = y) ⨿ (f x != y)

  
X, Y: UU
f: X ≃ Y
x: X
is: isisolated X x
y: Y
ne: x != invmap f y
(f x = y) ⨿ (f x != y)
 
X, Y: UU
f: X ≃ Y
x: X
is: isisolated X x
y: Y
ne: x != invmap f y
f x != y
 
X, Y: UU
f: X ≃ Y
x: X
is: isisolated X x
y: Y
ne: x != invmap f y
eq: f x = y
∅
 
X, Y: UU
f: X ≃ Y
x: X
is: isisolated X x
y: Y
eq: f x = y
x = invmap f y
 
X, Y: UU
f: X ≃ Y
x: X
is: isisolated X x
y: Y
eq: f x = y
f x = y
 assumption. }
Defined.


X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
is: isincl f
x: X
is0: isisolated Y (f x)
isisolated X x

f: X → Y
is: isincl f
x: X
is0: isisolated Y (f x)
isisolated X x

x: X

isisolated X x

x: X

x': X
a:= is0 (f x'): (f x = f x') ⨿ (f x != f x')
(x = x') ⨿ (x != x')

  
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
is: isincl f
x: X
is0: isisolated Y (f x)
x': X
a1: f x = f x'
(x = x') ⨿ (x != x')
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
is: isincl f
x: X
is0: isisolated Y (f x)
x': X
a2: f x != f x'
(x = x') ⨿ (x != x')
 
X, Y: UU
f: X → Y
is: isincl f
x: X
is0: isisolated Y (f x)
x': X
a2: f x != f x'
(x = x') ⨿ (x != x')

  apply (ii2 ((negf (@maponpaths _ _ f _ _)) a2)).
Defined.


X: UU
isisolated (X ⨿ unit) (inr tt)


X: UU
isisolated (X ⨿ unit) (inr tt)

  
X: UU
isisolated (X ⨿ unit) (inr tt)
 
X: UU
∏ x' : X ⨿ unit, (inr tt = x') ⨿ (inr tt != x')
 
X: UU
x': X ⨿ unit
(inr tt = x') ⨿ (inr tt != x')
 
X: UU
x: X
(inr tt = inl x) ⨿ (inr tt != inl x)
X: UU
u: unit
(inr tt = inr u) ⨿ (inr tt != inr u)

  
X: UU
u: unit
(inr tt = inr u) ⨿ (inr tt != inr u)
 
X: UU
(inr tt = inr tt) ⨿ (inr tt != inr tt)

  apply (ii1 (idpath _)).
Defined.

(** *** Decidable types are sets *)


X: UU
isdeceq X → isaset X


X: UU
isdeceq X → isaset X

  
X: UU
is: isdeceq X
x, x': X
isaprop (x = x')
 apply (isaproppathsfromisolated X x (is x)).
Defined.

(** *** Decidable equality on a sigma type *)

X: UU
P: X → UU
isdeceq X
→ (∏ x : X, isdeceq (P x)) → isdeceq (∑ x : X, P x)


X: UU
P: X → UU
isdeceq X
→ (∏ x : X, isdeceq (P x)) → isdeceq (∑ x : X, P x)

  
X: UU
P: X → UU
HX: isdeceq X
HP: ∏ x : X, isdeceq (P x)
isdeceq (∑ x : X, P x)

  
X: UU
P: X → UU
HX: isdeceq X
HP: ∏ x : X, isdeceq (P x)
xp, yq: ∑ x : X, P x
decidable (xp = yq)

  
X: UU
P: X → UU
HX: isdeceq X
HP: ∏ x : X, isdeceq (P x)
xp, yq: ∑ x : X, P x
e_xy: pr1 xp = pr1 yq
decidable (xp = yq)
X: UU
P: X → UU
HX: isdeceq X
HP: ∏ x : X, isdeceq (P x)
xp, yq: ∑ x : X, P x
ne_xy: pr1 xp != pr1 yq
decidable (xp = yq)

  
X: UU
P: X → UU
HX: isdeceq X
HP: ∏ x : X, isdeceq (P x)
xp, yq: ∑ x : X, P x
e_xy: pr1 xp = pr1 yq
decidable (xp = yq)
 
X: UU
P: X → UU
HX: isdeceq X
HP: ∏ x : X, isdeceq (P x)
xp, yq: ∑ x : X, P x
e_xy: pr1 xp = pr1 yq
e_pq: transportf (λ x : X, P x) e_xy (pr2 xp) =
pr2 yq
decidable (xp = yq)
X: UU
P: X → UU
HX: isdeceq X
HP: ∏ x : X, isdeceq (P x)
xp, yq: ∑ x : X, P x
e_xy: pr1 xp = pr1 yq
ne_pq: transportf (λ x : X, P x) e_xy (pr2 xp)
!= pr2 yq
decidable (xp = yq)

    
X: UU
P: X → UU
HX: isdeceq X
HP: ∏ x : X, isdeceq (P x)
xp, yq: ∑ x : X, P x
e_xy: pr1 xp = pr1 yq
e_pq: transportf (λ x : X, P x) e_xy (pr2 xp) =
pr2 yq
decidable (xp = yq)
 
X: UU
P: X → UU
HX: isdeceq X
HP: ∏ x : X, isdeceq (P x)
xp, yq: ∑ x : X, P x
e_xy: pr1 xp = pr1 yq
e_pq: transportf (λ x : X, P x) e_xy (pr2 xp) =
pr2 yq
xp = yq
 exact (total2_paths_f e_xy e_pq).
    
X: UU
P: X → UU
HX: isdeceq X
HP: ∏ x : X, isdeceq (P x)
xp, yq: ∑ x : X, P x
e_xy: pr1 xp = pr1 yq
ne_pq: transportf (λ x : X, P x) e_xy (pr2 xp)
!= pr2 yq
decidable (xp = yq)
 
X: UU
P: X → UU
HX: isdeceq X
HP: ∏ x : X, isdeceq (P x)
xp, yq: ∑ x : X, P x
e_xy: pr1 xp = pr1 yq
ne_pq: transportf (λ x : X, P x) e_xy (pr2 xp)
!= pr2 yq
xp != yq
 
X: UU
P: X → UU
HX: isdeceq X
HP: ∏ x : X, isdeceq (P x)
xp, yq: ∑ x : X, P x
e_xy: pr1 xp = pr1 yq
ne_pq: transportf (λ x : X, P x) e_xy (pr2 xp)
!= pr2 yq
e_xpyq: xp = yq
∅
 
X: UU
P: X → UU
HX: isdeceq X
HP: ∏ x : X, isdeceq (P x)
xp, yq: ∑ x : X, P x
e_xy: pr1 xp = pr1 yq
ne_pq: transportf (λ x : X, P x) e_xy (pr2 xp)
!= pr2 yq
e_xpyq: xp = yq
transportf (λ x : X, P x) e_xy (pr2 xp) = pr2 yq

      
X: UU
P: X → UU
HX: isdeceq X
HP: ∏ x : X, isdeceq (P x)
xp, yq: ∑ x : X, P x
e_xy: pr1 xp = pr1 yq
ne_pq: transportf (λ x : X, P x) e_xy (pr2 xp)
!= pr2 yq
e_xpyq: xp = yq
e_pq:= fiber_paths e_xpyq: transportf (λ x : X, P x)
  (base_paths xp yq e_xpyq) 
  (pr2 xp) = pr2 yq
transportf (λ x : X, P x) e_xy (pr2 xp) = pr2 yq

      
X: UU
P: X → UU
HX: isdeceq X
HP: ∏ x : X, isdeceq (P x)
xp, yq: ∑ x : X, P x
e_xy: pr1 xp = pr1 yq
ne_pq: transportf (λ x : X, P x) e_xy (pr2 xp)
!= pr2 yq
e_xpyq: xp = yq
e_pq:= fiber_paths e_xpyq: transportf (λ x : X, P x)
  (base_paths xp yq e_xpyq) 
  (pr2 xp) = pr2 yq
transportf (λ x : X, P x) e_xy (pr2 xp) =
transportf (λ x : X, P x) 
  (base_paths xp yq e_xpyq) 
  (pr2 xp)

      
X: UU
P: X → UU
HX: isdeceq X
HP: ∏ x : X, isdeceq (P x)
xp, yq: ∑ x : X, P x
e_xy: pr1 xp = pr1 yq
ne_pq: transportf (λ x : X, P x) e_xy (pr2 xp)
!= pr2 yq
e_xpyq: xp = yq
e_pq:= fiber_paths e_xpyq: transportf (λ x : X, P x)
  (base_paths xp yq e_xpyq) 
  (pr2 xp) = pr2 yq
e_xy = base_paths xp yq e_xpyq

  (* NOTE: want [maponpaths_2] from the [TypeTheory] library here. Upstream it to [Foundations], perhaps? *)
      apply isasetifdeceq, HX.
  
X: UU
P: X → UU
HX: isdeceq X
HP: ∏ x : X, isdeceq (P x)
xp, yq: ∑ x : X, P x
ne_xy: pr1 xp != pr1 yq
decidable (xp = yq)
 
X: UU
P: X → UU
HX: isdeceq X
HP: ∏ x : X, isdeceq (P x)
xp, yq: ∑ x : X, P x
ne_xy: pr1 xp != pr1 yq
xp != yq
 
X: UU
P: X → UU
HX: isdeceq X
HP: ∏ x : X, isdeceq (P x)
xp, yq: ∑ x : X, P x
ne_xy: pr1 xp != pr1 yq
e_xypq: xp = yq
∅
 apply ne_xy, base_paths, e_xypq.
Defined.


(** *** Construction of functions with specified values at a few isolated points *)

y1, y': Y
X → Y

y1, y': Y
X → Y

y1, y': Y
x: X
Y

y1, y': Y
x: X
a: x1 = x
Y

x1: X
i1: isisolated X x1
y1, y': Y
x: X
b: x1 != x
Y

x1: X

y1, y': Y
x: X
a: x1 = x
Y
 exact y1.
  
X, Y: UU
x1: X
i1: isisolated X x1
y1, y': Y
x: X
b: x1 != x
Y
 exact y'.
Defined.

x1: X

  exact (isolfun1 x1 (i x1)).

Y

Y

X, Y: UU
i: isdeceq X
x1, x2: X
y1, y2, y': Y
X → Y


X, Y: UU
i: isdeceq X
x1, x2: X
y1, y2, y': Y
X → Y

  
X, Y: UU
i: isdeceq X
x1, x2: X
Y → Y → Y → X → Y

  exact (isolfun2 x1 x2 (i x1) (i x2)).
Defined.


X, Y: UU
x1, x2, x3: X
i1: isisolated X x1
i2: isisolated X x2
i3: isisolated X x3
y1, y2, y3, y': Y
X → Y


X, Y: UU
x1, x2, x3: X
i1: isisolated X x1
i2: isisolated X x2
i3: isisolated X x3
y1, y2, y3, y': Y
X → Y

  
X, Y: UU
x1, x2, x3: X
i1: isisolated X x1
i2: isisolated X x2
i3: isisolated X x3
y1, y2, y3, y': Y
x: X
Y

i1: isisolated X x1
i2: isisolated X x2
i3: isisolated X x3
y1, y2, y3, y': Y
x: X
a: x1 = x
Y

i1: isisolated X x1
i2: isisolated X x2
i3: isisolated X x3
y1, y2, y3, y': Y
x: X
b: x1 != x
Y

  
X, Y: UU
x1, x2, x3: X
i1: isisolated X x1
i2: isisolated X x2
i3: isisolated X x3
y1, y2, y3, y': Y
x: X
a: x1 = x
Y
 exact y1.

i1: isisolated X x1

i3: isisolated X x3
y1, y2, y3, y': Y

Y

i1: isisolated X x1

x: X

b0: x2 != x
Y

x1, x2, x3: X
i1: isisolated X x1
i2: isisolated X x2
i3: isisolated X x3
y1, y2, y3, y': Y
x: X
b: x1 != x
a: x2 = x
Y
 exact y2.
    
X, Y: UU
x1, x2, x3: X
i1: isisolated X x1
i2: isisolated X x2
i3: isisolated X x3
y1, y2, y3, y': Y
x: X

b0: x2 != x
Y

x1, x2, x3: X
i1: isisolated X x1
i2: isisolated X x2
i3: isisolated X x3
y1, y2, y3, y': Y
x: X
b: x1 != x
b0: x2 != x

X, Y: UU
x1, x2, x3: X
i1: isisolated X x1
i2: isisolated X x2
i3: isisolated X x3

x: X
b: x1 != x

X, Y: UU
x1, x2, x3: X
i1: isisolated X x1
i2: isisolated X x2
i3: isisolated X x3

x: X
b: x1 != x
b0: x2 != x
a: x3 = x
Y
 exact y3.
      
X, Y: UU
x1, x2, x3: X
i1: isisolated X x1
i2: isisolated X x2
i3: isisolated X x3
y1, y2, y3, y': Y
x: X
b: x1 != x
b0: x2 != x
b1: x3 != x
Y
 exact y'.
Defined.


X, Y: UU
i: isdeceq X
x1, x2, x3: X
y1, y2, y3, y': Y
X → Y

  
X, Y: UU
i: isdeceq X
x1, x2, x3: X
Y → Y → Y → Y → X → Y

  exact (isolfun3 x1 x2 x3 (i x1) (i x2) (i x3)).
Defined.

(** **** [ bool ] is a set *)


isaset bool


isaset bool

  apply (isasetifdeceq _ isdeceqbool).
Defined.

(** ** Splitting of [ X ] into a coproduct defined by a function [ X -> bool ] *)



X: UU
f: X → bool
x: X
hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false


X: UU
f: X → bool
x: X
hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false

  
X: UU
f: X → bool
x: X
hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false
 
X: UU
f: X → bool
x: X
a: f x = true
hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false
X: UU
f: X → bool
x: X
b: f x = false
hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false

  
X: UU
f: X → bool
x: X
a: f x = true
hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false
 apply (ii1 (make_hfiber f x a)).
  
X: UU
f: X → bool
x: X
b: f x = false
hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false
 apply (ii2 (make_hfiber f x b)).
Defined.

Definition subsetsplitinv {X : UU} (f : X -> bool)
           (ab : (hfiber f true) ⨿ (hfiber f false)) : X
  := match ab with ii1 xt => pr1 xt | ii2 xf => pr1 xf end.


X: UU
f: X → bool
X ≃ hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false


X: UU
f: X → bool
X ≃ hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false

  
X: UU
f: X → bool
X ≃ hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false

  
X: UU
f: X → bool
ff:= subsetsplit f: X → hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false
X ≃ hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false
 
X: UU
f: X → bool
ff:= subsetsplit f: X → hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false
gg:= subsetsplitinv f: hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false → X
X ≃ hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false

  
X: UU
f: X → bool
ff:= subsetsplit f: X → hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false
gg:= subsetsplitinv f: hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false → X
isweq ff

  
X: UU
f: X → bool
ff:= subsetsplit f: X → hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false
gg:= subsetsplitinv f: hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false → X
∏ a : X, gg (ff a) = a
X: UU
f: X → bool
ff:= subsetsplit f: X → hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false
gg:= subsetsplitinv f: hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false → X
egf: ∏ a : X, gg (ff a) = a
isweq ff

  
X: UU
f: X → bool
ff:= subsetsplit f: X → hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false
gg:= subsetsplitinv f: hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false → X
∏ a : X, gg (ff a) = a

    
X: UU
f: X → bool
ff:= subsetsplit f: X → hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false
gg:= subsetsplitinv f: hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false → X
a: X
gg (ff a) = a
 
X: UU
f: X → bool
ff:= subsetsplit f: X → hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false
gg:= subsetsplitinv f: hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false → X
a: X
gg (subsetsplit f a) = a
 
X: UU
f: X → bool
ff:= subsetsplit f: X → hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false
gg:= subsetsplitinv f: hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false → X
a: X
gg
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (f a = true) ⨿ (f a = false),
      hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false)
     (λ a0 : f a = true, inl (make_hfiber f a a0))
     (λ b : f a = false, inr (make_hfiber f a b))
     (boolchoice (f a))) = a

    
X: UU
f: X → bool
ff:= subsetsplit f: X → hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false
gg:= subsetsplitinv f: hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false → X
a: X
et: f a = true
gg
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (f a = true) ⨿ (f a = false),
      hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false)
     (λ a0 : f a = true, inl (make_hfiber f a a0))
     (λ b : f a = false, inr (make_hfiber f a b))
     (inl et)) = a
X: UU
f: X → bool
ff:= subsetsplit f: X → hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false
gg:= subsetsplitinv f: hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false → X
a: X
ef: f a = false
gg
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (f a = true) ⨿ (f a = false),
      hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false)
     (λ a0 : f a = true, inl (make_hfiber f a a0))
     (λ b : f a = false, inr (make_hfiber f a b))
     (inr ef)) = a
 
X: UU
f: X → bool
ff:= subsetsplit f: X → hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false
gg:= subsetsplitinv f: hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false → X
a: X
et: f a = true
a = a
X: UU
f: X → bool
ff:= subsetsplit f: X → hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false
gg:= subsetsplitinv f: hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false → X
a: X
ef: f a = false
gg
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (f a = true) ⨿ (f a = false),
      hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false)
     (λ a0 : f a = true, inl (make_hfiber f a a0))
     (λ b : f a = false, inr (make_hfiber f a b))
     (inr ef)) = a
 
X: UU
f: X → bool
ff:= subsetsplit f: X → hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false
gg:= subsetsplitinv f: hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false → X
a: X
ef: f a = false
gg
  (coprod_rect
     (λ _ : (f a = true) ⨿ (f a = false),
      hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false)
     (λ a0 : f a = true, inl (make_hfiber f a a0))
     (λ b : f a = false, inr (make_hfiber f a b))
     (inr ef)) = a
 
X: UU
f: X → bool
ff:= subsetsplit f: X → hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false
gg:= subsetsplitinv f: hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false → X
a: X
ef: f a = false
a = a

    apply idpath.
  
X: UU
f: X → bool
ff:= subsetsplit f: X → hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false
gg:= subsetsplitinv f: hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false → X
egf: ∏ a : X, gg (ff a) = a
isweq ff

  
X: UU
f: X → bool
ff:= subsetsplit f: X → hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false
gg:= subsetsplitinv f: hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false → X
egf: ∏ a : X, gg (ff a) = a
∏ a : hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false, ff (gg a) = a
X: UU
f: X → bool
ff:= subsetsplit f: X → hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false
gg:= subsetsplitinv f: hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false → X
egf: ∏ a : X, gg (ff a) = a
efg: ∏ a : hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false, ff (gg a) = a
isweq ff

  
X: UU
f: X → bool
ff:= subsetsplit f: X → hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false
gg:= subsetsplitinv f: hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false → X
egf: ∏ a : X, gg (ff a) = a
∏ a : hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false, ff (gg a) = a

    
X: UU
f: X → bool
ff:= subsetsplit f: X → hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false
gg:= subsetsplitinv f: hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false → X
egf: ∏ a : X, gg (ff a) = a
a: hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false
ff (gg a) = a
 
X: UU
f: X → bool
ff:= subsetsplit f: X → hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false
gg:= subsetsplitinv f: hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false → X
egf: ∏ a : X, gg (ff a) = a
et: hfiber f true
ff (gg (inl et)) = inl et
X: UU
f: X → bool
ff:= subsetsplit f: X → hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false
gg:= subsetsplitinv f: hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false → X
egf: ∏ a : X, gg (ff a) = a
ef: hfiber f false
ff (gg (inr ef)) = inr ef

    
X: UU
f: X → bool
ff:= subsetsplit f: X → hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false
gg:= subsetsplitinv f: hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false → X
egf: ∏ a : X, gg (ff a) = a
et: hfiber f true
ff (gg (inl et)) = inl et
 
X: UU
f: X → bool
ff:= subsetsplit f: X → hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false
gg:= subsetsplitinv f: hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false → X
egf: ∏ a : X, gg (ff a) = a
x: X
et': f x = true
ff (gg (inl (x,, et'))) = inl (x,, et')
 
X: UU
f: X → bool
ff:= subsetsplit f: X → hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false
gg:= subsetsplitinv f: hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false → X
egf: ∏ a : X, gg (ff a) = a
x: X
et': f x = true
ff x = inl (x,, et')
 
X: UU
f: X → bool
ff:= subsetsplit f: X → hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false
gg:= subsetsplitinv f: hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false → X
egf: ∏ a : X, gg (ff a) = a
x: X
et': f x = true
subsetsplit f x = inl (x,, et')
 
X: UU
f: X → bool
ff:= subsetsplit f: X → hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false
gg:= subsetsplitinv f: hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false → X
egf: ∏ a : X, gg (ff a) = a
x: X
et': f x = true
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (f x = true) ⨿ (f x = false),
   hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false)
  (λ a : f x = true, inl (make_hfiber f x a))
  (λ b : f x = false, inr (make_hfiber f x b))
  (boolchoice (f x)) = inl (x,, et')

      
X: UU
f: X → bool
ff:= subsetsplit f: X → hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false
gg:= subsetsplitinv f: hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false → X
egf: ∏ a : X, gg (ff a) = a
x: X
et', e1: f x = true
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (f x = true) ⨿ (f x = false),
   hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false)
  (λ a : f x = true, inl (make_hfiber f x a))
  (λ b : f x = false, inr (make_hfiber f x b))
  (inl e1) = inl (x,, et')
X: UU
f: X → bool
ff:= subsetsplit f: X → hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false
gg:= subsetsplitinv f: hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false → X
egf: ∏ a : X, gg (ff a) = a
x: X
et': f x = true
e2: f x = false
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (f x = true) ⨿ (f x = false),
   hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false)
  (λ a : f x = true, inl (make_hfiber f x a))
  (λ b : f x = false, inr (make_hfiber f x b))
  (inr e2) = inl (x,, et')

      
X: UU
f: X → bool
ff:= subsetsplit f: X → hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false
gg:= subsetsplitinv f: hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false → X
egf: ∏ a : X, gg (ff a) = a
x: X
et', e1: f x = true
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (f x = true) ⨿ (f x = false),
   hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false)
  (λ a : f x = true, inl (make_hfiber f x a))
  (λ b : f x = false, inr (make_hfiber f x b))
  (inl e1) = inl (x,, et')
 
X: UU
f: X → bool
ff:= subsetsplit f: X → hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false
gg:= subsetsplitinv f: hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false → X
egf: ∏ a : X, gg (ff a) = a
x: X
et', e1: f x = true
make_hfiber f x e1 = x,, et'
 
X: UU
f: X → bool
ff:= subsetsplit f: X → hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false
gg:= subsetsplitinv f: hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false → X
egf: ∏ a : X, gg (ff a) = a
x: X
et', e1: f x = true
e1 = et'

        
X: UU
f: X → bool
ff:= subsetsplit f: X → hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false
gg:= subsetsplitinv f: hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false → X
egf: ∏ a : X, gg (ff a) = a
x: X
et', e1: f x = true
isaset bool
 apply isasetbool.
      
X: UU
f: X → bool
ff:= subsetsplit f: X → hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false
gg:= subsetsplitinv f: hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false → X
egf: ∏ a : X, gg (ff a) = a
x: X
et': f x = true
e2: f x = false
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (f x = true) ⨿ (f x = false),
   hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false)
  (λ a : f x = true, inl (make_hfiber f x a))
  (λ b : f x = false, inr (make_hfiber f x b))
  (inr e2) = inl (x,, et')
 induction (nopathstruetofalse (pathscomp0 (pathsinv0 et') e2)).
    
X: UU
f: X → bool
ff:= subsetsplit f: X → hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false
gg:= subsetsplitinv f: hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false → X
egf: ∏ a : X, gg (ff a) = a
ef: hfiber f false
ff (gg (inr ef)) = inr ef
 
X: UU
f: X → bool
ff:= subsetsplit f: X → hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false
gg:= subsetsplitinv f: hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false → X
egf: ∏ a : X, gg (ff a) = a
x: X
et': f x = false
ff (gg (inr (x,, et'))) = inr (x,, et')
 
X: UU
f: X → bool
ff:= subsetsplit f: X → hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false
gg:= subsetsplitinv f: hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false → X
egf: ∏ a : X, gg (ff a) = a
x: X
et': f x = false
ff x = inr (x,, et')
 
X: UU
f: X → bool
ff:= subsetsplit f: X → hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false
gg:= subsetsplitinv f: hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false → X
egf: ∏ a : X, gg (ff a) = a
x: X
et': f x = false
subsetsplit f x = inr (x,, et')
 
X: UU
f: X → bool
ff:= subsetsplit f: X → hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false
gg:= subsetsplitinv f: hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false → X
egf: ∏ a : X, gg (ff a) = a
x: X
et': f x = false
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (f x = true) ⨿ (f x = false),
   hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false)
  (λ a : f x = true, inl (make_hfiber f x a))
  (λ b : f x = false, inr (make_hfiber f x b))
  (boolchoice (f x)) = inr (x,, et')

      
X: UU
f: X → bool
ff:= subsetsplit f: X → hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false
gg:= subsetsplitinv f: hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false → X
egf: ∏ a : X, gg (ff a) = a
x: X
et': f x = false
e1: f x = true
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (f x = true) ⨿ (f x = false),
   hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false)
  (λ a : f x = true, inl (make_hfiber f x a))
  (λ b : f x = false, inr (make_hfiber f x b))
  (inl e1) = inr (x,, et')
X: UU
f: X → bool
ff:= subsetsplit f: X → hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false
gg:= subsetsplitinv f: hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false → X
egf: ∏ a : X, gg (ff a) = a
x: X
et', e2: f x = false
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (f x = true) ⨿ (f x = false),
   hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false)
  (λ a : f x = true, inl (make_hfiber f x a))
  (λ b : f x = false, inr (make_hfiber f x b))
  (inr e2) = inr (x,, et')

      
X: UU
f: X → bool
ff:= subsetsplit f: X → hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false
gg:= subsetsplitinv f: hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false → X
egf: ∏ a : X, gg (ff a) = a
x: X
et': f x = false
e1: f x = true
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (f x = true) ⨿ (f x = false),
   hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false)
  (λ a : f x = true, inl (make_hfiber f x a))
  (λ b : f x = false, inr (make_hfiber f x b))
  (inl e1) = inr (x,, et')
 induction (nopathsfalsetotrue (pathscomp0 (pathsinv0 et') e1)).
      
X: UU
f: X → bool
ff:= subsetsplit f: X → hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false
gg:= subsetsplitinv f: hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false → X
egf: ∏ a : X, gg (ff a) = a
x: X
et', e2: f x = false
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (f x = true) ⨿ (f x = false),
   hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false)
  (λ a : f x = true, inl (make_hfiber f x a))
  (λ b : f x = false, inr (make_hfiber f x b))
  (inr e2) = inr (x,, et')
 
X: UU
f: X → bool
ff:= subsetsplit f: X → hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false
gg:= subsetsplitinv f: hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false → X
egf: ∏ a : X, gg (ff a) = a
x: X
et', e2: f x = false
make_hfiber f x e2 = x,, et'
 
X: UU
f: X → bool
ff:= subsetsplit f: X → hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false
gg:= subsetsplitinv f: hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false → X
egf: ∏ a : X, gg (ff a) = a
x: X
et', e2: f x = false
e2 = et'

        
X: UU
f: X → bool
ff:= subsetsplit f: X → hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false
gg:= subsetsplitinv f: hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false → X
egf: ∏ a : X, gg (ff a) = a
x: X
et', e2: f x = false
isaset bool
 apply isasetbool.
  
X: UU
f: X → bool
ff:= subsetsplit f: X → hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false
gg:= subsetsplitinv f: hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false → X
egf: ∏ a : X, gg (ff a) = a
efg: ∏ a : hfiber f true ⨿ hfiber f false, ff (gg a) = a
isweq ff

  apply (isweq_iso _ _ egf efg).
Defined.

(* End of file *)
